quote_en: 王阿姨是我妈妈的姐姐。 Wáng āyí shì wǒ māma de jiějie.
quote_zh: Auntie Wang is my mother's older sister.
ex_en: 我阿姨住在新西兰。每年春节我们都去阿姨家。阿姨做的菜非常好吃。 Wǒ āyí zhù zài Xīnxīlán. Měinián chūnjié wǒmen dōu qù āyí jiā. Āyí zuò de cài fēicháng hǎochī.
ex_zh: My auntie lives in New Zealand. Every Spring Festival we go to her house. The dishes she makes are extremely delicious.

quote_en: 她是个很有爱心的人。 Tā shì gè hěn yǒu àixīn de rén.
quote_zh: She is a very caring person.
ex_en: 我们学校每年都献爱心。同学们帮助社区的老人家。大家都觉得很开心。 Wǒmen xuéxiào měinián dōu xiàn àixīn. Tóngxuémen bāngzhù shèqū de lǎorénjiā. Dàjiā dōu juéde hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Our school shows care every year. Students help the elderly in the community. Everyone feels very happy.

def_en: to cherish, to care for, to protect
quote_en: 我们要爱护小动物。 Wǒmen yào àihù xiǎo dòngwù.
quote_zh: We should care for small animals.
ex_en: 老师常常说，要爱护环境。大家听了以后，都开始注意自己的行为。 Lǎoshī chángcháng shuō, yào àihù huánjìng. Dàjiā tīng le yǐhòu, dōu kāishǐ zhùyì zìjǐ de xíngwéi.
ex_zh: The teacher often says we must protect the environment. After hearing this, everyone started paying attention to their own behavior.

quote_en: 图书馆里很安静。 Túshūguǎn lǐ hěn ānjìng.
quote_zh: The library is very quiet.
ex_en: 考试的时候教室非常安静。同学们都在认真写作业。老师走来走去，也不说话。 Kǎoshì de shíhou jiàoshì fēicháng ānjìng. Tóngxuémen dōu zài rènzhēn xiě zuòyè. Lǎoshī zǒu lái zǒu qù, yě bù shuōhuà.
ex_zh: During the exam the classroom is extremely quiet. All the students are carefully doing their papers. The teacher walks around and doesn't speak.

quote_en: 我安排好了明天的行程。 Wǒ ānpái hǎo le míngtiān de xíngchéng.
quote_zh: I have arranged tomorrow's itinerary.
ex_en: 老师安排我们星期六去奥克兰玩。大家早上八点在学校门口见面。要记得带水。 Lǎoshī ānpái wǒmen xīngqīliù qù Àokèlán wán. Dàjiā zǎoshang bā diǎn zài xuéxiào ménkǒu jiànmiàn. Yào jìde dài shuǐ.
ex_zh: The teacher arranged for us to go to Auckland on Saturday. Everyone meets at the school gate at 8 am. Remember to bring water.

quote_en: 过马路要注意安全。 Guò mǎlù yào zhùyì ānquán.
quote_zh: Be safe when crossing the street.
ex_en: 新西兰的学校很重视安全。校车每天准时来。老师也会提醒大家注意安全。 Xīnxīlán de xuéxiào hěn zhòngshì ānquán. Xiàochē měitiān zhǔnshí lái. Lǎoshī yě huì tíxǐng dàjiā zhùyì ānquán.
ex_zh: Schools in New Zealand take safety very seriously. The school bus comes on time every day. The teacher also reminds everyone to be safe.

quote_en: 我吃得很饱了。 Wǒ chī de hěn bǎo le.
quote_zh: I am very full.
ex_en: 妈妈做的饺子太好吃了。我吃了两盘，现在非常饱。爸爸说吃饱了要休息一下。 Māma zuò de jiǎozi tài hǎochī le. Wǒ chī le liǎng pán, xiànzài fēicháng bǎo. Bàba shuō chībǎo le yào xiūxi yíxià.
ex_zh: The dumplings Mum made are so delicious. I ate two plates and now I'm extremely full. Dad says after eating you should rest a bit.

def_zh: 老师办公室；办公室很大
quote_en: 老师去办公室了。 Lǎoshī qù bàngōngshì le.
quote_zh: The teacher went to the office.
ex_en: 我们学校的新办公室很漂亮。里面有很多电脑。老师们都很喜欢那里。 Wǒmen xuéxiào de xīn bàngōngshì hěn piàoliang. Lǐmiàn yǒu hěnduō diànnǎo. Lǎoshīmen dōu hěn xǐhuan nàlǐ.
ex_zh: Our school's new office is very beautiful. Inside there are many computers. All the teachers like it very much.

def_zh: 生活在北半球；北半球国家
quote_en: 中国在北半球。 Zhōngguó zài běibànqiú.
quote_zh: China is in the northern hemisphere.
ex_en: 新西兰在南半球，所以和北半球的季节不一样。中国冬天的时候，这里是夏天。 Xīnxīlán zài nánbànqiú, suǒyǐ hé běibànqiú de jìjié bù yíyàng. Zhōngguó dōngtiān de shíhou, zhèlǐ shì xiàtiān.
ex_zh: New Zealand is in the southern hemisphere, so its seasons are different from the northern hemisphere. When it is winter in China, it is summer here.

quote_en: 我不喜欢这个，有别的吗？ Wǒ bù xǐhuan zhège, yǒu biéde ma?
quote_zh: I don't like this one; do you have others?
ex_en: 除了汉语，他还想学别的语言。他觉得法语很有意思。但是他每天都很忙。 Chúle Hànyǔ, tā hái xiǎng xué biéde yǔyán. Tā juéde Fǎyǔ hěn yǒuyìsi. Dànshì tā měitiān dōu hěn máng.
ex_zh: Besides Chinese, he also wants to learn other languages. He thinks French is very interesting. But he is very busy every day.

quote_en: 你不要打扰别人。 Nǐ bùyào dǎrǎo biérén.
quote_zh: Do not disturb others.
ex_en: 我们应该尊重别人的意见。每个人都有自己的想法。不要总是说自己想说的。 Wǒmen yīnggāi zūnzhòng biérén de yìjiàn. Měi gè rén dōu yǒu zìjǐ de xiǎngfǎ. Bùyào zǒngshì shuō zìjǐ xiǎng shuō de.
ex_zh: We should respect other people's opinions. Everyone has their own thoughts. Don't just say what you want to say.

quote_en: 夏天我喜欢吃冰。 Xiàtiān wǒ xǐhuan chī bīng.
quote_zh: I like eating ice in summer.
ex_en: 新西兰的冬天很冷，路上会有冰。开车的时候要小心，不要开太快。 Xīnxīlán de dōngtiān hěn lěng, lùshàng huì yǒu bīng. Kāichē de shíhou yào xiǎoxīn, bùyào kāi tài kuài.
ex_zh: Winter in New Zealand is very cold, and there is ice on the roads. When driving, be careful and don't drive too fast.

quote_en: 孩子们喜欢吃冰淇淋。 Háizimen xǐhuan chī bīngqílín.
quote_zh: Children like to eat ice cream.
ex_en: 天气很热的时候，我们一起去超市买冰淇淋。我最喜欢草莓味的。弟弟喜欢吃巧克力的。 Tiānqì hěn rè de shíhou, wǒmen yìqǐ qù chāoshì mǎi bīngqílín. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan cǎoméi wèi de. Dìdi xǐhuan chī qiǎokèlì de.
ex_zh: When the weather is very hot, we go to the supermarket together to buy ice cream. I like strawberry flavour best. My younger brother likes chocolate.

quote_en: 很多运动，比如游泳和跑步，对身体好。 Hěnduō yùndòng, bǐrú yóuyǒng hé pǎobù, duì shēntǐ hǎo.
quote_zh: Many sports, such as swimming and running, are good for health.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多好玩的户外活动，比如爬山、划船和看橄榄球比赛。周末我们全家经常一起去。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō hǎowán de hùwài huódòng, bǐrú páshān, huáchuán hé kàn gǎnlǎnqiú bǐsài. Zhōumò wǒmen quánjiā jīngcháng yìqǐ qù.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many fun outdoor activities, such as hiking, boating, and watching rugby matches. On weekends our whole family often goes together.

quote_en: 今天晚上有一场篮球比赛。 Jīntiān wǎnshàng yǒu yì chǎng lánqiú bǐsài.
quote_zh: There is a basketball match tonight.
ex_en: 下个月学校有橄榄球比赛。我们班的同学都想去参加。老师说只要努力，成绩一定不错。 Xià ge yuè xuéxiào yǒu gǎnlǎnqiú bǐsài. Wǒmen bān de tóngxué dōu xiǎng qù cānjiā. Lǎoshī shuō zhǐyào nǔlì, chéngjì yídìng búcuò.
ex_zh: Next month the school has a rugby match. All the students in our class want to participate. The teacher says as long as we work hard, the results will be good.

quote_en: 这家餐厅的菜不错。 Zhè jiā cāntīng de cài búcuò.
quote_zh: The food at this restaurant is not bad.
ex_en: 你的中文说得真不错。你一定学了很久吧？我很喜欢学中文，但是我觉得写汉字有点难。 Nǐ de Zhōngwén shuō de zhēn búcuò. Nǐ yídìng xué le hěn jiǔ ba? Wǒ hěn xǐhuan xué Zhōngwén, dànshì wǒ juéde xiě hànzì yǒudiǎn nán.
ex_zh: Your spoken Chinese is really not bad. You must have studied for a long time, right? I really like learning Chinese, but I find writing characters a bit difficult.

quote_en: 我们只有五分钟，时间不够。 Wǒmen zhǐyǒu wǔ fēnzhōng, shíjiān búgòu.
quote_zh: We only have five minutes; there's not enough time.
ex_en: 我觉得我学习不够努力，所以成绩不太好。妈妈说每天要多看一点书。从今天开始，我要更认真。 Wǒ juéde wǒ xuéxí búgòu nǔlì, suǒyǐ chéngjì bú tài hǎo. Māma shuō měitiān yào duō kàn yìdiǎn shū. Cóng jīntiān kāishǐ, wǒ yào gèng rènzhēn.
ex_zh: I think I don't study hard enough, so my grades aren't very good. Mum says every day I need to read a bit more. Starting today, I will be more serious.

quote_en: 今天来了不少客人。 Jīntiān lái le bùshǎo kèrén.
quote_zh: Quite a few guests came today.
ex_en: 图书馆里有不少学生在看书。他们都很安静。我也喜欢去那里，因为可以找到很多有意思的书。 Túshūguǎn li yǒu bùshǎo xuésheng zài kàn shū. Tāmen dōu hěn ānjìng. Wǒ yě xǐhuan qù nàlǐ, yīnwèi kěyǐ zhǎodào hěnduō yǒuyìsi de shū.
ex_zh: Quite a few students are reading in the library. They are all very quiet. I also like going there, because I can find many interesting books.

quote_en: 我们有不同的爱好。 Wǒmen yǒu bùtóng de àihào.
quote_zh: We have different hobbies.
ex_en: 我们班有来自不同国家的学生。有的从中国来，有的从英国来。大家都很友好。 Wǒmen bān yǒu láizì bùtóng guójiā de xuésheng. Yǒu de cóng Zhōngguó lái, yǒu de cóng Yīngguó lái. Dàjiā dōu hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: Our class has students from different countries. Some come from China, some come from the United Kingdom. Everyone is very friendly.

quote_en: 我想参加学校的足球队。 Wǒ xiǎng cānjiā xuéxiào de zúqiúduì.
quote_zh: I want to join the school's soccer team.
ex_en: 很多同学参加了学校的志愿者活动。他们去社区帮助老人家。大家都觉得很有意义。 Hěnduō tóngxué cānjiā le xuéxiào de zhìyuànzhě huódòng. Tāmen qù shèqū bāngzhù lǎorénjiā. Dàjiā dōu juéde hěn yǒu yìyì.
ex_zh: Many students participated in the school's volunteer activities. They go to the community to help the elderly. Everyone feels it is very meaningful.

quote_en: 服务员拿来了菜单。 Fúwùyuán ná lái le càidān.
quote_zh: The waiter brought the menu.
ex_en: 餐厅的菜很多。我看了半天，不知道点什么好。 Cāntīng de cài hěnduō. Wǒ kàn le bàntiān, bù zhīdào diǎn shénme hǎo.
ex_zh: The restaurant has many dishes. I looked for a long time and didn't know what to order.

quote_en: 孩子们在草地上玩。 Háizimen zài cǎodì shàng wán.
quote_zh: The children are playing on the grass.
ex_en: 周末我们去公园的草地上野餐。大家带很多好吃的，非常开心。 Zhōumò wǒmen qù gōngyuán de cǎodì shàng yěcān. Dàjiā dài hěnduō hǎochī de, fēicháng kāixīn.
ex_zh: On weekends we go for a picnic on the grass in the park. Everyone brings lots of tasty food, very happy.

quote_en: 我的手机比他的差一点。 Wǒ de shǒujī bǐ tā de chà yìdiǎn.
quote_zh: My phone is a bit worse than his.
ex_en: 那家商店的服务很差。我以后再也不去那里了。 Nà jiā shāngdiàn de fúwù hěn chà. Wǒ yǐhòu zài yě bù qù nàlǐ le.
ex_zh: That shop's service is very poor. I'll never go there again.

def_zh: 差不多一样；差不多好了
quote_en: 这两个手机差不多。 Zhè liǎng ge shǒujī chàbuduō.
quote_zh: These two mobile phones are almost the same.
ex_en: 我的作业差不多写完了。再给我十分钟就好了。 Wǒ de zuòyè chàbuduō xiě wán le. Zài gěi wǒ shí fēnzhōng jiù hǎo le.
ex_zh: I've almost finished my homework. Give me another ten minutes and it'll be done.

quote_en: 长江是中国最长的河。 Chángjiāng shì Zhōngguó zuì cháng de hé.
quote_zh: The Yangtze River is the longest river in China.
ex_en: 我奶奶家住在长江边。那里的风景很美丽。 Wǒ nǎinai jiā zhù zài chángjiāng biān. Nàlǐ de fēngjǐng hěn měilì.
ex_zh: My grandmother's home is by the Yangtze River. The scenery there is very beautiful.

quote_en: 妈妈去超市买菜了。 Māma qù chāoshì mǎi cài le.
quote_zh: Mum went to the supermarket to buy vegetables.
ex_en: 我们家附近有一个很大的超市。周末我经常和爸爸一起去买东西。 Wǒmen jiā fùjìn yǒu yí ge hěn dà de chāoshì. Zhōumò wǒ jīngcháng hé bàba yìqǐ qù mǎi dōngxi.
ex_zh: There is a very large supermarket near our home. On weekends I often go shopping with Dad.

quote_en: 他这次考试成功了。 Tā zhè cì kǎoshì chénggōng le.
quote_zh: He succeeded in this exam.
ex_en: 想要成功，就要努力学习。我每天放学回家先写作业。 Xiǎng yào chénggōng, jiù yào nǔlì xuéxí. Wǒ měitiān fàngxué huí jiā xiān xiě zuòyè.
ex_zh: If you want to succeed, you must study hard. Every day after school I go home and do my homework first.

quote_en: 他的成绩一直很好。 Tā de chéngjì yìzhí hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: His grades have always been very good.
ex_en: 这次数学考试我得了九十分。老师说继续努力，下次可以更好。 Zhè cì shùxué kǎoshì wǒ dé le jiǔshí fēn. Lǎoshī shuō jìxù nǔlì, xià cì kěyǐ gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: I got ninety marks on this maths exam. The teacher said keep working hard, next time can be even better.

quote_en: 上海是一个很大的城市。 Shànghǎi shì yí ge hěn dà de chéngshì.
quote_zh: Shanghai is a very big city.
ex_en: 我住在新西兰的奥克兰。这是一个非常美丽的城市。 Wǒ zhù zài Xīnxīlán de Àokèlán. Zhè shì yí ge fēicháng měilì de chéngshì.
ex_zh: I live in Auckland, New Zealand. It is a very beautiful city.

quote_en: 我希望成为一名医生。 Wǒ xīwàng chéngwéi yì míng yīshēng.
quote_zh: I hope to become a doctor.
ex_en: 从小我的梦想就是成为一名老师。现在我在努力学习。 Cóngxiǎo wǒ de mèngxiǎng jiù shì chéngwéi yì míng lǎoshī. Xiànzài wǒ zài nǔlì xuéxí.
ex_zh: Since I was little, my dream has been to become a teacher. Now I am studying hard.

quote_en: 他今天早上迟到了。 Tā jīntiān zǎoshang chídào le.
quote_zh: He was late this morning.
ex_en: 上学一定不能迟到。所以每天晚上我早点睡觉。 Shàngxué yídìng bùnéng chídào. Suǒyǐ měitiān wǎnshang wǒ zǎodiǎn shuìjiào.
ex_zh: You must not be late for school. So every night I go to bed a little earlier.

quote_en: 我们坐船去岛上。 Wǒmen zuò chuán qù dǎo shàng.
quote_zh: We take a boat to the island.
ex_en: 上个假期，我和家人一起坐船去了北岛的岛屿湾。海边的风景非常漂亮。 Shàng ge jiàqī, wǒ hé jiārén yìqǐ zuò chuán qù le Běidǎo de Dǎoyǔ Wān. Hǎibiān de fēngjǐng fēicháng piàoliang.
ex_zh: Last holiday, I took a boat with my family to the Bay of Islands in the North Island. The seaside scenery was extremely beautiful.

quote_en: 请把窗户打开。 Qǐng bǎ chuānghu dǎkāi.
quote_zh: Please open the window.
ex_en: 教室里有大窗户。天气好的时候，我们打开窗户，让新鲜空气进来。 Jiàoshì lǐ yǒu dà chuānghu. Tiānqì hǎo de shíhou, wǒmen dǎkāi chuānghu, ràng xīnxiān kōngqì jìnlái.
ex_zh: The classroom has big windows. When the weather is nice, we open the windows to let fresh air in.

def_en: set off, depart, start a journey
quote_en: 我们明天早上八点出发。 Wǒmen míngtiān zǎoshang bā diǎn chūfā.
quote_zh: We set off at eight o'clock tomorrow morning.
ex_en: 学校组织春游。早上八点我们在校门口集合，准时出发。 Xuéxiào zǔzhī chūnyóu. Zǎoshang bā diǎn wǒmen zài xiàoménkǒu jíhé, zhǔnshí chūfā.
ex_zh: The school organized a spring outing. We gathered at the school gate at eight and set off on time.

quote_en: 我出生在北京。 Wǒ chūshēng zài Běijīng.
quote_zh: I was born in Beijing.
ex_en: 我出生在新西兰的基督城。那里有很多公园和花园。 Wǒ chūshēng zài Xīnxīlán de Jīdūchéng. Nàlǐ yǒu hěnduō gōngyuán hé huāyuán.
ex_zh: I was born in Christchurch, New Zealand. There are many parks and gardens there.

def_en: always, at all times (used with negative)
quote_en: 他从来不迟到。 Tā cónglái bù chídào.
quote_zh: He is never late.
ex_en: 我妈妈从来不生气。她总是很有耐心。 Wǒ māma cónglái bù shēngqì. Tā zǒngshì hěn yǒu nàixīn.
ex_zh: My mum never gets angry. She is always very patient.

quote_en: 这个孩子真聪明。 Zhè ge háizi zhēn cōngmíng.
quote_zh: This child is really smart.
ex_en: 我们班有一个很聪明的同学。他数学总是考满分。 Wǒmen bān yǒu yí ge hěn cōngmíng de tóngxué. Tā shùxué zǒngshì kǎo mǎnfēn.
ex_zh: There is a very smart student in our class. He always gets full marks in maths.

quote_en: 她从小就会游泳。 Tā cóngxiǎo jiù huì yóuyǒng.
quote_zh: She has been able to swim since childhood.
ex_en: 我从小学就开始学中文了。那时候我觉得汉字很难。 Wǒ cóng xiǎoxué jiù kāishǐ xué Zhōngwén le. Nà shíhou wǒ juéde hànzì hěn nán.
ex_zh: I started learning Chinese since primary school. Back then I found characters very difficult.

quote_en: 他大概明天到。 Tā dàgài míngtiān dào.
quote_zh: He will arrive approximately tomorrow.
ex_en: 从我家到学校，走路大概要二十分钟。所以我每天都坐校车。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào xuéxiào, zǒulù dàgài yào èrshí fēnzhōng. Suǒyǐ wǒ měitiān dōu zuò xiàochē.
ex_zh: From my home to school, walking takes about twenty minutes. So I take the school bus every day.

def_en: to do part-time job, to work as an employee
quote_en: 他周末去餐馆打工。 Tā zhōumò qù cānguǎn dǎgōng.
quote_zh: He works part-time at a restaurant on weekends.
ex_en: 很多大学生暑假的时候会去打工。我哥哥去年在超市打工。 Hěnduō dàxuéshēng shǔjià de shíhou huì qù dǎgōng. Wǒ gēge qùnián zài chāoshì dǎgōng.
ex_zh: Many university students work part-time during the summer holiday. My older brother worked part-time at a supermarket last year.

quote_en: 我喜欢大海。 Wǒ xǐhuan dàhǎi.
quote_zh: I like the ocean.
ex_en: 新西兰的大海非常漂亮。周末我们常去海边玩。 Xīnxīlán de dàhǎi fēicháng piàoliang. Zhōumò wǒmen cháng qù hǎibiān wán.
ex_zh: New Zealand's ocean is very beautiful. On weekends we often go to the seaside.

quote_en: 我们在学校大门见面吧。 Wǒmen zài xuéxiào dàmén jiànmiàn ba.
quote_zh: Let's meet at the school gate.
ex_en: 每天早上八点，学校的大门就关了。所以不能迟到。 Měitiān zǎoshang bā diǎn, xuéxiào de dàmén jiù guān le. Suǒyǐ bùnéng chídào.
ex_zh: Every morning at eight, the school gate closes. So you can't be late.

def_en: to work as a profession, when...
quote_en: 我爸爸是当老师的。 Wǒ bàba shì dāng lǎoshī de.
quote_zh: My dad works as a teacher.
ex_en: 我小时候的梦想是当医生。现在我觉得当老师也很好。 Wǒ xiǎoshíhou de mèngxiǎng shì dāng yīshēng. Xiànzài wǒ juéde dāng lǎoshī yě hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: When I was little my dream was to become a doctor. Now I think being a teacher is also good.

quote_en: 我当然可以去。 Wǒ dāngrán kěyǐ qù.
quote_zh: Of course I can go.
ex_en: 你喜欢吃饺子吗？当然喜欢！我妈妈做的饺子最好吃。 Nǐ xǐhuan chī jiǎozi ma? Dāngrán xǐhuan! Wǒ māma zuò de jiǎozi zuì hǎochī.
ex_zh: Do you like eating dumplings? Of course! My mum's dumplings are the best.

quote_en: 公园里到处是花。 Gōngyuán lǐ dàochù shì huā.
quote_zh: The park is full of flowers everywhere.
ex_en: 新西兰到处都很干净。大家都很爱护环境。 Xīnxīlán dàochù dōu hěn gānjìng. Dàjiā dōu hěn àihù huánjìng.
ex_zh: New Zealand is clean everywhere. Everyone protects the environment.

quote_en: 她对人很大方。 Tā duì rén hěn dàfāng.
quote_zh: She is very generous with people.
ex_en: 我的朋友很大方，每次出去都请客。 Wǒ de péngyou hěn dàfāng, měi cì chūqù dōu qǐngkè.
ex_zh: My friend is very generous; every time we go out he treats.

quote_en: 大人工作很辛苦。 Dàren gōngzuò hěn xīnkǔ.
quote_zh: Adults work very hard.
ex_en: 我们小孩子要听大人的话。他们说的都是为我们好。 Wǒmen xiǎohái zi yào tīng dàren de huà. Tāmen shuō de dōu shì wèi wǒmen hǎo.
ex_zh: We children should listen to adults. What they say is all for our good.

quote_en: 我打算明年去中国。 Wǒ dǎsuàn míngnián qù Zhōngguó.
quote_zh: I plan to go to China next year.
ex_en: 这个假期你打算做什么？我打算和同学一起去旅游。 Zhège jiàqī nǐ dǎsuàn zuò shénme? Wǒ dǎsuàn hé tóngxué yìqǐ qù lǚyóu.
ex_zh: What do you plan to do this holiday? I plan to travel with my classmates.

quote_en: 冬天要穿大衣。 Dōngtiān yào chuān dàyī.
quote_zh: In winter you need to wear a coat.
ex_en: 新西兰的冬天很冷，出门要穿大衣。还要戴帽子。 Xīnxīlán de dōngtiān hěn lěng, chūmén yào chuān dàyī. Hái yào dài màozi.
ex_zh: Winter in New Zealand is very cold; you need to wear a coat when going out. Also need to wear a hat.

quote_en: 我们准备登机了。 Wǒmen zhǔnbèi dēngjī le.
quote_zh: We are ready to board the plane.
ex_en: 去中国旅游，我们要先办签证，然后去机场登机。 Qù Zhōngguó lǚyóu, wǒmen yào xiān bàn qiānzhèng, ránhòu qù jīchǎng dēngjī.
ex_zh: To travel to China, we need to apply for a visa first, then go to the airport to board the plane.

quote_en: 这个桌子很低。 Zhège zhuōzi hěn dī.
quote_zh: This table is very low.
ex_en: 爸爸说话声音很低，因为妹妹在睡觉。 Bàba shuōhuà shēngyīn hěn dī, yīnwèi mèimei zài shuìjiào.
ex_zh: Dad spoke in a low voice because my younger sister was sleeping.

quote_en: 我坐地铁去学校。 Wǒ zuò dìtiě qù xuéxiào.
quote_zh: I take the subway to school.
ex_en: 北京的地铁很方便。我每次去北京都坐地铁。 Běijīng de dìtiě hěn fāngbiàn. Wǒ měi cì qù Běijīng dōu zuò dìtiě.
ex_zh: Beijing's subway is very convenient. Every time I go to Beijing I take the subway.

quote_en: 现在电商很流行。 Xiànzài diànshāng hěn liúxíng.
quote_zh: Online business is very popular now.
ex_en: 很多年轻人喜欢在网上买东西。电商让生活更方便。 Hěnduō niánqīng rén xǐhuan zài wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi. Diànshāng ràng shēnghuó gèng fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: Many young people like to buy things online. E‑commerce makes life more convenient.

quote_en: 他在读一本小说。 Tā zài dú yì běn xiǎoshuō.
quote_zh: He is reading a novel.
ex_en: 我姐姐在北京读大学。她很喜欢那里的生活。 Wǒ jiějie zài Běijīng dú dàxué. Tā hěn xǐhuan nàlǐ de shēnghuó.
ex_zh: My older sister is attending university in Beijing. She really likes life there.

quote_en: 今天有三十度。 Jīntiān yǒu sānshí dù.
quote_zh: It is thirty degrees today.
ex_en: 新西兰夏天温度不高，大概二十度左右。很舒服。 Xīnxīlán xiàtiān wēndù bù gāo, dàgài èrshí dù zuǒyòu. Hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: The temperature in New Zealand in summer is not high, about twenty degrees. Very comfortable.

quote_en: 她的头发很短。 Tā de tóufa hěn duǎn.
quote_zh: Her hair is very short.
ex_en: 夏天我喜欢穿短裤和T恤。这样很凉快。 Xiàtiān wǒ xǐhuan chuān duǎnkù hé T xù. Zhèyàng hěn liángkuai.
ex_zh: In summer I like to wear shorts and a T‑shirt. This is very cool.

quote_en: 我给你发短信吧。 Wǒ gěi nǐ fā duǎnxìn ba.
quote_zh: I'll send you a text message.
ex_en: 妈妈给我发了一条短信，让我早点回家。 Māma gěi wǒ fā le yì tiáo duǎnxìn, ràng wǒ zǎodiǎn huí jiā.
ex_zh: Mum sent me a text message telling me to come home early.

quote_en: 我们学校有橄榄球队。 Wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu gǎnlǎnqiú duì.
quote_zh: Our school has a rugby team.
ex_en: 全黑队是新西兰的橄榄球队。他们很厉害。 Quánhēiduì shì Xīnxīlán de gǎnlǎnqiú duì. Tāmen hěn lìhai.
ex_zh: The All Blacks is New Zealand's rugby team. They are very strong.

quote_en: 我家对面有一个公园。 Wǒ jiā duìmiàn yǒu yí ge gōngyuán.
quote_zh: There is a park opposite my home.
ex_en: 超市就在学校对面。放学后我常去那里买东西。 Chāoshì jiù zài xuéxiào duìmiàn. Fàngxué hòu wǒ cháng qù nàlǐ mǎi dōngxi.
ex_zh: The supermarket is right opposite the school. After school I often go there to buy things.

quote_en: 多数同学都喜欢体育课。 Duōshù tóngxué dōu xǐhuan tǐyù kè.
quote_zh: The majority of students like PE class.
ex_en: 我们班的多数人都会说中文。他们学了很久了。 Wǒmen bān de duōshù rén dōu huì shuō Zhōngwén. Tāmen xué le hěn jiǔ le.
ex_zh: The majority of students in our class can speak Chinese. They have been learning for a long time.

quote_en: 今天多云。 Jīntiān duōyún.
quote_zh: It's cloudy today.
ex_en: 天气预报说明天多云，可能有雨。出门要带伞。 Tiānqì yùbào shuō míngtiān duōyún, kěnéng yǒu yǔ. Chūmén yào dài sǎn.
ex_zh: The weather forecast says tomorrow will be cloudy, possibly rainy. Bring an umbrella when going out.

quote_en: 我肚子疼。 Wǒ dùzi téng.
quote_zh: My stomach hurts.
ex_en: 昨天晚上我吃了太多冰淇淋，肚子不舒服。 Zuótiān wǎnshang wǒ chī le tài duō bīngqílín, dùzi bù shūfu.
ex_zh: Last night I ate too much ice cream, my stomach felt unwell.

quote_en: 六一儿童节是孩子们的节日。 Liùyī értóng jié shì háizimen de jiérì.
quote_zh: Children's Day on June 1st is a holiday for children.
ex_en: 这个公园是专门为儿童建的。里面有很多好玩的东西。 Zhège gōngyuán shì zhuānmén wèi értóng jiàn de. Lǐmiàn yǒu hěnduō hǎowán de dōngxi.
ex_zh: This park was built specially for children. There are many fun things inside.

def_en: to send a message or email
quote_en: 我给他发了一条短信。 Wǒ gěi tā fā le yì tiáo duǎnxìn.
quote_zh: I sent him a text message.
ex_en: 老师给我们发了一封邮件，告诉我们明天的安排。 Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen fā le yì fēng yóujiàn, gàosu wǒmen míngtiān de ānpái.
ex_zh: The teacher sent us an email telling us tomorrow's arrangements.

quote_en: 请把书放在桌子上。 Qǐng bǎ shū fàng zài zhuōzi shàng.
quote_zh: Please put the book on the table.
ex_en: 我把手机放在书包里。这样就不会丢了。 Wǒ bǎ shǒujī fàng zài shūbāo lǐ. Zhèyàng jiù bù huì diū le.
ex_zh: I put my phone in my school bag. That way I won't lose it.

quote_en: 我的房间很干净。 Wǒ de fángjiān hěn gānjìng.
quote_zh: My room is very clean.
ex_en: 学校宿舍的房间不大，但是很舒服。 Xuéxiào sùshè de fángjiān bù dà, dànshì hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: The dormitory rooms at school are not big, but they are comfortable.

quote_en: 他们家的房子很大。 Tāmen jiā de fángzi hěn dà.
quote_zh: Their house is very big.
ex_en: 新西兰的房子很多都有花园。夏天可以在花园里玩。 Xīnxīlán de fángzi hěnduō dōu yǒu huāyuán. Xiàtiān kěyǐ zài huāyuán lǐ wán.
ex_zh: Many houses in New Zealand have gardens. In summer you can play in the garden.

def_en: to find out, to discover, discovery
quote_en: 我发现了一个好地方。 Wǒ fāxiàn le yí ge hǎo dìfang.
quote_zh: I discovered a good place.
ex_en: 我在图书馆发现了一本很有意思的书。你要不要看？ Wǒ zài túshūguǎn fāxiàn le yì běn hěn yǒuyìsi de shū. Nǐ yào bùyào kàn?
ex_zh: I discovered a very interesting book in the library. Do you want to read it?

quote_en: 她在学法语。 Tā zài xué fǎyǔ.
quote_zh: She is learning French.
ex_en: 除了英语和中文，我还会一点法语。我觉得法语很好听。 Chúle Yīngyǔ hé Zhōngwén, wǒ hái huì yìdiǎn fǎyǔ. Wǒ juéde fǎyǔ hěn hǎotīng.
ex_zh: Besides English and Chinese, I also know a little French. I think French sounds beautiful.

quote_en: 这个电影非常好看。 Zhège diànyǐng fēicháng hǎokàn.
quote_zh: This movie is very good.
ex_en: 我非常喜欢新西兰的风景。这里的大海和山都很美。 Wǒ fēicháng xǐhuan Xīnxīlán de fēngjǐng. Zhèlǐ de dàhǎi hé shān dōu hěn měi.
ex_zh: I really like the scenery in New Zealand. The ocean and mountains here are very beautiful.

quote_en: 这家餐厅的服务很好。 Zhè jiā cāntīng de fúwù hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: This restaurant's service is very good.
ex_en: 那个商店的服务员很热情。下次我还去那里买东西。 Nàge shāngdiàn de fúwùyuán hěn rèqíng. Xià cì wǒ hái qù nàlǐ mǎi dōngxi.
ex_zh: The shop assistant at that shop was very friendly. Next time I'll go there again to buy things.

def_zh: 餐厅服务员；服务员态度
quote_en: 服务员拿来了菜单。 Fúwùyuán ná lái le càidān.
quote_zh: The waiter brought the menu.
ex_en: 服务员很耐心地给我们介绍菜。我们点了很多好吃的。 Fúwùyuán hěn nàixīn de gěi wǒmen jièshào cài. Wǒmen diǎn le hěnduō hǎochī de.
ex_zh: The waiter patiently introduced the dishes to us. We ordered many delicious things.

quote_en: 明天考试，我要复习。 Míngtiān kǎoshì, wǒ yào fùxí.
quote_zh: I need to review for tomorrow's exam.
ex_en: 每天晚上我都复习今天学的东西。这样学习进步很快。 Měitiān wǎnshang wǒ dōu fùxí jīntiān xué de dōngxi. Zhèyàng xuéxí jìnbù hěn kuài.
ex_zh: Every evening I review what I learned today. This way I make progress quickly.

quote_en: 教室很干净。 Jiàoshì hěn gānjìng.
quote_zh: The classroom is very clean.
ex_en: 新西兰的街道很干净。大家都把垃圾扔进垃圾桶。 Xīnxīlán de jiēdào hěn gānjìng. Dàjiā dōu bǎ lājī rēng jìn lājītǒng.
ex_zh: The streets in New Zealand are very clean. Everyone puts rubbish in the bin.

def_en: to be moved, to be touched
quote_en: 听了这个故事，我很感动。 Tīng le zhège gùshi, wǒ hěn gǎndòng.
quote_zh: After hearing this story, I was very moved.
ex_en: 妈妈每天给我做饭，我很感动。我要对她说谢谢。 Māma měitiān gěi wǒ zuò fàn, wǒ hěn gǎndòng. Wǒ yào duì tā shuō xièxie.
ex_zh: Mum cooks for me every day; I am very touched. I want to say thank you to her.

quote_en: 他刚才出去了。 Tā gāngcái chūqù le.
quote_zh: He went out just now.
ex_en: 我刚才看见老师在办公室。你要找她吗？ Wǒ gāngcái kànjiàn lǎoshī zài bàngōngshì. Nǐ yào zhǎo tā ma?
ex_zh: I saw the teacher in the office just now. Do you want to see her?

quote_en: 我感冒了，头疼。 Wǒ gǎnmào le, tóuténg.
quote_zh: I have a cold; my head hurts.
ex_en: 冬天容易感冒。要多喝水，多休息。 Dōngtiān róngyì gǎnmào. Yào duō hē shuǐ, duō xiūxi.
ex_zh: It's easy to catch a cold in winter. Drink more water and rest more.

quote_en: 我明年上高中。 Wǒ míngnián shàng gāozhōng.
quote_zh: I will go to high school next year.
ex_en: 高中的功课比初中难。我要更努力学习。 Gāozhōng de gōngkè bǐ chūzhōng nán. Wǒ yào gèng nǔlì xuéxí.
ex_zh: High school coursework is harder than middle school. I need to study harder.

quote_en: 他个子很高。 Tā gèzi hěn gāo.
quote_zh: He is very tall.
ex_en: 我哥哥个子很高，有一米八。他喜欢打篮球。 Wǒ gēge gèzi hěn gāo, yǒu yī mǐ bā. Tā xǐhuan dǎ lánqiú.
ex_zh: My older brother is very tall, 1.8 meters. He likes to play basketball.

quote_en: 我爸爸是工程师。 Wǒ bàba shì gōngchéngshī.
quote_zh: My dad is an engineer.
ex_en: 工程师的工作很有意思。我也想当工程师。 Gōngchéngshī de gōngzuò hěn yǒuyìsi. Wǒ yě xiǎng dāng gōngchéngshī.
ex_zh: An engineer's job is very interesting. I also want to become an engineer.

quote_en: 这个西瓜有五公斤。 Zhège xīguā yǒu wǔ gōngjīn.
quote_zh: This watermelon weighs five kilograms.
ex_en: 我买了两公斤苹果，花了二十块钱。 Wǒ mǎi le liǎng gōngjīn píngguǒ, huā le èrshí kuài qián.
ex_zh: I bought two kilograms of apples and spent twenty dollars.

quote_en: 学校离家三公里。 Xuéxiào lí jiā sān gōnglǐ.
quote_zh: The school is three kilometers from home.
ex_en: 从我家到市中心大概五公里。坐公交车很方便。 Cóng wǒ jiā dào shì zhōngxīn dàgài wǔ gōnglǐ. Zuò gōngjiāochē hěn fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: From my home to the city center is about five kilometers. Taking the bus is very convenient.

quote_en: 我爸爸是工人。 Wǒ bàba shì gōngrén.
quote_zh: My dad is a worker.
ex_en: 建筑工人很辛苦。我们应该尊重他们。 Jiànzhù gōngrén hěn xīnkǔ. Wǒmen yīnggāi zūnzhòng tāmen.
ex_zh: Construction workers work very hard. We should respect them.

quote_en: 妈妈在一家公司工作。 Māma zài yì jiā gōngsī gōngzuò.
quote_zh: Mum works at a company.
ex_en: 我姐姐毕业后去了一家新西兰的公司。她很喜欢那里。 Wǒ jiějie bìyè hòu qù le yì jiā Xīnxīlán de gōngsī. Tā hěn xǐhuan nàlǐ.
ex_zh: After graduating, my older sister went to a company in New Zealand. She really likes it there.

quote_en: 这些菜够我们吃了。 Zhèxiē cài gòu wǒmen chī le.
quote_zh: These dishes are enough for us.
ex_en: 钱够吗？不够的话我这里有。 Qián gòu ma? Búgòu dehuà wǒ zhèlǐ yǒu.
ex_zh: Is the money enough? If not, I have some here.

quote_en: 今天刮风了。 Jīntiān guāfēng le.
quote_zh: It's windy today.
ex_en: 新西兰的惠灵顿经常刮风。出门要穿大衣。 Xīnxīlán de Huìlíngdùn jīngcháng guāfēng. Chūmén yào chuān dàyī.
ex_zh: Wellington, New Zealand is often windy. You need to wear a coat when going out.

quote_en: 我们关系很好。 Wǒmen guānxì hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: We have a good relationship.
ex_en: 我和哥哥的关系很好。我们经常一起打球。 Wǒ hé gēge de guānxì hěn hǎo. Wǒmen jīngcháng yìqǐ dǎ qiú.
ex_zh: My brother and I have a good relationship. We often play ball together.

quote_en: 我们去广场散步吧。 Wǒmen qù guǎngchǎng sànbù ba.
quote_zh: Let's go for a walk in the square.
ex_en: 奥克兰有很多广场。周末人们喜欢在那里活动。 Àokèlán yǒu hěnduō guǎngchǎng. Zhōumò rénmen xǐhuan zài nàlǐ huódòng.
ex_zh: Auckland has many squares. On weekends people like to have activities there.

quote_en: 老师很关心我们。 Lǎoshī hěn guānxīn wǒmen.
quote_zh: The teacher cares about us.
ex_en: 妈妈每天关心我的学习。她希望我进步。 Māma měitiān guānxīn wǒ de xuéxí. Tā xīwàng wǒ jìnbù.
ex_zh: Mum cares about my studies every day. She hopes I make progress.

quote_en: 我们回家过年。 Wǒmen huí jiā guònián.
quote_zh: We go home to celebrate the New Year.
ex_en: 春节的时候，全家一起过年。大家吃饺子，看春晚。 Chūnjié de shíhou, quánjiā yìqǐ guònián. Dàjiā chī jiǎozi, kàn chūnwǎn.
ex_zh: During the Spring Festival, the whole family celebrates the New Year together. Everyone eats dumplings and watches the Spring Festival Gala.

quote_en: 妈妈给我讲故事。 Māma gěi wǒ jiǎng gùshi.
quote_zh: Mum tells me stories.
ex_en: 我喜欢听爷爷讲他小时候的故事。很有意思。 Wǒ xǐhuan tīng yéye jiǎng tā xiǎoshíhou de gùshi. Hěn yǒuyìsi.
ex_zh: I like listening to Grandpa tell stories from his childhood. They're very interesting.

quote_en: 这个蛋糕很好吃。 Zhège dàngāo hěn hǎochī.
quote_zh: This cake is very tasty.
ex_en: 新西兰的水果很好吃，特别是猕猴桃。 Xīnxīlán de shuǐguǒ hěn hǎochī, tèbié shì míhóutáo.
ex_zh: New Zealand fruit is very tasty, especially kiwifruit.

quote_en: 运动对身体有好处。 Yùndòng duì shēntǐ yǒu hǎochù.
quote_zh: Exercise is good for the body.
ex_en: 学中文有很多好处。可以去中国旅游，还能交朋友。 Xué Zhōngwén yǒu hěnduō hǎochù. Kěyǐ qù Zhōngguó lǚyóu, hái néng jiāo péngyou.
ex_zh: Learning Chinese has many benefits. You can travel to China and also make friends.

def_en: to be fond of learning, be eager to learn
quote_en: 他是个好学的孩子。 Tā shì ge hàoxué de háizi.
quote_zh: He is an eager-to-learn child.
ex_en: 我们班有一个好学的同学，每天都问老师问题。 Wǒmen bān yǒu yí ge hàoxué de tóngxué, měitiān dōu wèn lǎoshī wèntí.
ex_zh: There is an eager-to-learn student in our class who asks the teacher questions every day.

quote_en: 祝你考试好运。 Zhù nǐ kǎoshì hǎoyùn.
quote_zh: Good luck with your exam.
ex_en: 我要去参加比赛了。祝我好运吧！ Wǒ yào qù cānjiā bǐsài le. Zhù wǒ hǎoyùn ba!
ex_zh: I'm going to participate in the competition. Wish me good luck!

quote_en: 这本书很厚。 Zhè běn shū hěn hòu.
quote_zh: This book is very thick.
ex_en: 冬天要穿厚衣服。新西兰的冬天很冷。 Dōngtiān yào chuān hòu yīfu. Xīnxīlán de dōngtiān hěn lěng.
ex_zh: In winter you need to wear thick clothes. New Zealand's winter is very cold.

quote_en: 动物园里有猴子。 Dòngwùyuán li yǒu hóuzi.
quote_zh: There are monkeys in the zoo.
ex_en: 猴子很聪明，会做很多动作。小朋友们都很喜欢。 Hóuzi hěn cōngmíng, huì zuò hěnduō dòngzuò. Xiǎopéngyoumen dōu hěn xǐhuan.
ex_zh: Monkeys are very smart and can do many actions. Children all like them.

quote_en: 这个湖很漂亮。 Zhège hú hěn piàoliang.
quote_zh: This lake is very beautiful.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多湖，比如陶波湖。可以去那里划船。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō hú, bǐrú Táobō Hú. Kěyǐ qù nàlǐ huáchuán.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many lakes, such as Lake Taupō. You can go boating there.

quote_en: 周末我们去公园划船。 Zhōumò wǒmen qù gōngyuán huáchuán.
quote_zh: On weekends we go boating in the park.
ex_en: 在皇后镇可以划船。那里的风景很美。 Zài Huánghòu Zhèn kěyǐ huáchuán. Nàlǐ de fēngjǐng hěn měi.
ex_zh: You can go boating in Queenstown. The scenery there is very beautiful.

quote_en: 吃太多糖有坏处。 Chī tài duō táng yǒu huàichù.
quote_zh: Eating too much sugar has disadvantages.
ex_en: 长时间看手机有很多坏处。对眼睛不好。 Cháng shíjiān kàn shǒujī yǒu hěnduō huàichù. Duì yǎnjing bù hǎo.
ex_zh: Using your phone for a long time has many disadvantages. It's bad for your eyes.

quote_en: 我的手机坏了。 Wǒ de shǒujī huài le.
quote_zh: My phone is broken.
ex_en: 冰箱坏了，里面的冰淇淋都化了。 Bīngxiāng huài le, lǐmiàn de bīngqílín dōu huà le.
ex_zh: The fridge broke; all the ice cream inside melted.

quote_en: 我要去图书馆还书。 Wǒ yào qù túshūguǎn huán shū.
quote_zh: I need to return books to the library.
ex_en: 借了同学的东西要记得还。这是礼貌。 Jiè le tóngxué de dōngxi yào jìde huán. Zhè shì lǐmào.
ex_zh: If you borrow something from a classmate, remember to return it. This is polite.

quote_en: 黄河是中国的母亲河。 Huánghé shì Zhōngguó de mǔqīn hé.
quote_zh: The Yellow River is China's mother river.
ex_en: 黄河很长，经过很多城市。 Huánghé hěn cháng, jīngguò hěnduō chéngshì.
ex_zh: The Yellow River is very long and passes through many cities.

quote_en: 欢迎你来我家。 Huānyíng nǐ lái wǒ jiā.
quote_zh: Welcome to my home.
ex_en: 新西兰欢迎世界各地的游客。这里的人很友好。 Xīnxīlán huānyíng shìjiè gèdì de yóukè. Zhèlǐ de rén hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: New Zealand welcomes tourists from all over the world. The people here are very friendly.

quote_en: 我姐姐是护士。 Wǒ jiějie shì hùshi.
quote_zh: My older sister is a nurse.
ex_en: 护士的工作很辛苦。我们要感谢她们。 Hùshi de gōngzuò hěn xīnkǔ. Wǒmen yào gǎnxiè tāmen.
ex_zh: Nurses work very hard. We should thank them.

quote_en: 出国要带护照。 Chūguó yào dài hùzhào.
quote_zh: You need to bring your passport when going abroad.
ex_en: 我去中国旅游前，先办了护照和签证。 Wǒ qù Zhōngguó lǚyóu qián, xiān bàn le hùzhào hé qiānzhèng.
ex_zh: Before traveling to China, I applied for a passport and visa.

quote_en: 他看起来很急。 Tā kàn qǐlai hěn jí.
quote_zh: He looks very urgent.
ex_en: 别急，慢慢说。我可以帮你。 Bié jí, màn man shuō. Wǒ kěyǐ bāng nǐ.
ex_zh: Don't rush; speak slowly. I can help you.

quote_en: 我记住你的电话了。 Wǒ jìzhù nǐ de diànhuà le.
quote_zh: I remember your phone number.
ex_en: 老师说的话很重要，我要记下来。 Lǎoshī shuō de huà hěn zhòngyào, wǒ yào jì xiàlai.
ex_zh: What the teacher said is very important; I need to write it down.

quote_en: 假期我们去旅行。 Jiàqī wǒmen qù lǚxíng.
quote_zh: We're going on a trip during the holiday.
ex_en: 暑假的时候，我和朋友一起去南岛玩。 Shǔjià de shíhou, wǒ hé péngyou yìqǐ qù Nándǎo wán.
ex_zh: During the summer holiday, I went with friends to the South Island to have fun.

def_en: to talk, to say, to explain
quote_en: 老师给我们讲了一个故事。 Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen jiǎng le yí ge gùshi.
quote_zh: The teacher told us a story.
ex_en: 爷爷经常给我讲他年轻时候的事。 Yéye jīngcháng gěi wǒ jiǎng tā niánqīng shíhou de shì.
ex_zh: Grandpa often tells me about when he was young.

def_en: to give a speech, to talk
quote_en: 校长在讲话。 Xiàozhǎng zài jiǎnghuà.
quote_zh: The principal is giving a speech.
ex_en: 上课的时候不要讲话。要认真听老师讲课。 Shàngkè de shíhou bùyào jiǎnghuà. Yào rènzhēn tīng lǎoshī jiǎngkè.
ex_zh: Don't talk during class. Listen carefully to the teacher.

quote_en: 他每天去健身房健身。 Tā měitiān qù jiànshēnfáng jiànshēn.
quote_zh: He goes to the gym to work out every day.
ex_en: 健身对身体好。我每个周末去健身房。 Jiànshēn duì shēntǐ hǎo. Wǒ měi gè zhōumò qù jiànshēnfáng.
ex_zh: Working out is good for health. I go to the gym every weekend.

quote_en: 我家附近有一个健身房。 Wǒ jiā fùjìn yǒu yí ge jiànshēnfáng.
quote_zh: There's a gym near my home.
ex_en: 健身房里有跑步机和很多运动器材。 Jiànshēnfáng li yǒu pǎobùjī hé hěnduō yùndòng qìcái.
ex_zh: The gym has treadmills and lots of exercise equipment.

quote_en: 我有一个建议。 Wǒ yǒu yí ge jiànyì.
quote_zh: I have a suggestion.
ex_en: 老师建议我们每天读二十分钟中文。 Lǎoshī jiànyì wǒmen měitiān dú èrshí fēnzhōng Zhōngwén.
ex_zh: The teacher suggested that we read Chinese for twenty minutes every day.

quote_en: 我很喜欢交朋友。 Wǒ hěn xǐhuan jiāo péngyou.
quote_zh: I really like making friends.
ex_en: 在新学校，我交了很多新朋友。他们都很友好。 Zài xīn xuéxiào, wǒ jiāo le hěnduō xīn péngyou. Tāmen dōu hěn yǒuhǎo.
ex_zh: At the new school, I made many new friends. They are all very friendly.

quote_en: 明天要交作业。 Míngtiān yào jiāo zuòyè.
quote_zh: We need to hand in homework tomorrow.
ex_en: 我每天都按时交作业。老师表扬了我。 Wǒ měitiān dōu ànshí jiāo zuòyè. Lǎoshī biǎoyáng le wǒ.
ex_zh: I hand in my homework on time every day. The teacher praised me.

quote_en: 我的家乡在北京。 Wǒ de jiāxiāng zài Běijīng.
quote_zh: My hometown is Beijing.
ex_en: 我的家乡在新西兰的基督城。那里的花园很美。 Wǒ de jiāxiāng zài Xīnxīlán de Jīdūchéng. Nàlǐ de huāyuán hěn měi.
ex_zh: My hometown is Christchurch, New Zealand. The gardens there are very beautiful.

quote_en: 明天开家长会。 Míngtiān kāi jiāzhǎnghuì.
quote_zh: There is a parent‑teacher meeting tomorrow.
ex_en: 老师请家长来学校谈谈我们的学习。 Lǎoshī qǐng jiāzhǎng lái xuéxiào tán tan wǒmen de xuéxí.
ex_zh: The teacher invited parents to come to school to talk about our studies.

quote_en: 我可以借你的笔吗？ Wǒ kěyǐ jiè nǐ de bǐ ma?
quote_zh: May I borrow your pen?
ex_en: 同学借了我的字典，明天还给我。 Tóngxué jiè le wǒ de zìdiǎn, míngtiān huán gěi wǒ.
ex_zh: A classmate borrowed my dictionary and will return it tomorrow.

def_en: to receive (phone calls), to pick up (people), to catch (objects)
quote_en: 我去学校接弟弟。 Wǒ qù xuéxiào jiē dìdi.
quote_zh: I'm going to pick up my younger brother from school.
ex_en: 爸爸每天下午来接我放学。 Bàba měitiān xiàwǔ lái jiē wǒ fàngxué.
ex_zh: Dad comes to pick me up after school every afternoon.

def_en: programme for a performance or TV
quote_en: 这个节目很好看。 Zhège jiémù hěn hǎokàn.
quote_zh: This programme is very good.
ex_en: 春节晚会的节目很精彩。全家一起看。 Chūnjié wǎnhuì de jiémù hěn jīngcǎi. Quánjiā yìqǐ kàn.
ex_zh: The Spring Festival Gala's programmes are wonderful. The whole family watches together.

quote_en: 我来介绍一下我的朋友。 Wǒ lái jièshào yíxià wǒ de péngyou.
quote_zh: Let me introduce my friend.
ex_en: 新同学来的时候，老师让他介绍自己。 Xīn tóngxué lái de shíhou, lǎoshī ràng tā jièshào zìjǐ.
ex_zh: When a new classmate arrives, the teacher asks them to introduce themselves.

quote_en: 他接受了我的礼物。 Tā jiēshòu le wǒ de lǐwù.
quote_zh: He accepted my gift.
ex_en: 老师的建议很好，我愿意接受。 Lǎoshī de jiànyì hěn hǎo, wǒ yuànyì jiēshòu.
ex_zh: The teacher's suggestion is very good; I am willing to accept it.

quote_en: 这次考试我及格了。 Zhè cì kǎoshì wǒ jígé le.
quote_zh: I passed this exam.
ex_en: 要想及格，就要好好学习。平时要多复习。 Yào xiǎng jígé, jiù yào hǎohǎo xuéxí. Píngshí yào duō fùxí.
ex_zh: If you want to pass, you need to study hard. Usually you need to review more.

quote_en: 这是一个好机会。 Zhè shì yí ge hǎo jīhuì.
quote_zh: This is a good opportunity.
ex_en: 学校给了我们学习中文的机会。要珍惜。 Xuéxiào gěi le wǒmen xuéxí Zhōngwén de jīhuì. Yào zhēnxī.
ex_zh: The school gave us the opportunity to learn Chinese. We should cherish it.

quote_en: 新西兰的四季都很美。 Xīnxīlán de sì jì dōu hěn měi.
quote_zh: All four seasons in New Zealand are beautiful.
ex_en: 我最喜欢的季节是夏天。可以去海边玩。 Wǒ zuì xǐhuan de jìjié shì xiàtiān. Kěyǐ qù hǎibiān wán.
ex_zh: My favourite season is summer. I can go to the seaside.

quote_en: 我经常去图书馆。 Wǒ jīngcháng qù túshūguǎn.
quote_zh: I often go to the library.
ex_en: 周末我经常和朋友一起踢足球。 Zhōumò wǒ jīngcháng hé péngyou yìqǐ tī zúqiú.
ex_zh: On weekends I often play soccer with friends.

quote_en: 我们住在酒店。 Wǒmen zhù zài jiǔdiàn.
quote_zh: We stayed in a hotel.
ex_en: 去旅游的时候，我们住在皇后镇的酒店。 Qù lǚyóu de shíhou, wǒmen zhù zài Huánghòu Zhèn de jiǔdiàn.
ex_zh: When traveling, we stayed in a hotel in Queenstown.

quote_en: 明天可能下雨。 Míngtiān kěnéng xià yǔ.
quote_zh: It might rain tomorrow.
ex_en: 我可能要去奥克兰上大学。那里有很多学校。 Wǒ kěnéng yào qù Àokèlán shàng dàxué. Nàlǐ yǒu hěnduō xuéxiào.
ex_zh: I might go to Auckland for university. There are many schools there.

quote_en: 今天家里来了客人。 Jīntiān jiā lǐ lái le kèrén.
quote_zh: We have guests at home today.
ex_en: 妈妈做了很多菜招待客人。大家吃得很开心。 Māma zuò le hěnduō cài zhāodài kèrén. Dàjiā chī de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Mum made many dishes to entertain the guests. Everyone ate happily.

quote_en: 这里的空气很好。 Zhèlǐ de kōngqì hěn hǎo.
quote_zh: The air here is very good.
ex_en: 新西兰的空气很新鲜。很多人都喜欢来这里旅游。 Xīnxīlán de kōngqì hěn xīnxiān. Hěnduō rén dōu xǐhuan lái zhèlǐ lǚyóu.
ex_zh: New Zealand's air is very fresh. Many people like to travel here.

quote_en: 妹妹哭了。 Mèimei kū le.
quote_zh: My younger sister cried.
ex_en: 孩子摔倒了，但是没有哭。他真勇敢。 Háizi shuāidǎo le, dànshì méiyǒu kū. Tā zhēn yǒnggǎn.
ex_zh: The child fell, but didn't cry. He is really brave.

quote_en: 我会用筷子。 Wǒ huì yòng kuàizi.
quote_zh: I can use chopsticks.
ex_en: 吃中餐要用筷子。我学了很久才会。 Chī zhōngcān yào yòng kuàizi. Wǒ xué le hěn jiǔ cái huì.
ex_zh: To eat Chinese food you use chopsticks. I learned for a long time before I could.

quote_en: 这个菜很辣。 Zhège cài hěn là.
quote_zh: This dish is very spicy.
ex_en: 四川菜很辣。我吃不习惯。 Sìchuān cài hěn là. Wǒ chī bù xíguàn.
ex_zh: Sichuan food is very spicy. I'm not used to it.

quote_en: 动物园里有老虎。 Dòngwùyuán li yǒu lǎohǔ.
quote_zh: There are tigers in the zoo.
ex_en: 老虎是很大的动物。小朋友们都很喜欢看。 Lǎohǔ shì hěn dà de dòngwù. Xiǎopéngyoumen dōu hěn xǐhuan kàn.
ex_zh: Tigers are very big animals. Children all like to see them.

quote_en: 猫会抓老鼠。 Māo huì zhuā lǎoshǔ.
quote_zh: Cats catch rats.
ex_en: 新西兰没有大老鼠。这里的环境很干净。 Xīnxīlán méiyǒu dà lǎoshǔ. Zhèlǐ de huánjìng hěn gānjìng.
ex_zh: New Zealand doesn't have big rats. The environment here is very clean.

quote_en: 今天天气很凉快。 Jīntiān tiānqì hěn liángkuai.
quote_zh: The weather is pleasantly cool today.
ex_en: 夏天去海边很凉快。还可以游泳。 Xiàtiān qù hǎibiān hěn liángkuai. Hái kěyǐ yóuyǒng.
ex_zh: Going to the seaside in summer is cool. You can also swim.

quote_en: 我明天离开北京。 Wǒ míngtiān líkāi Běijīng.
quote_zh: I'm leaving Beijing tomorrow.
ex_en: 他离开了家乡，去外地工作。他很想家。 Tā líkāi le jiāxiāng, qù wàidì gōngzuò. Tā hěn xiǎng jiā.
ex_zh: He left his hometown to work in another place. He misses home.

quote_en: 妈妈给我零花钱。 Māma gěi wǒ línghuāqián.
quote_zh: Mum gives me pocket money.
ex_en: 我用零花钱买了冰淇淋。真好吃。 Wǒ yòng línghuāqián mǎi le bīngqílín. Zhēn hǎochī.
ex_zh: I bought ice cream with my pocket money. It was delicious.

quote_en: 你有零钱吗？ Nǐ yǒu língqián ma?
quote_zh: Do you have small change?
ex_en: 买水的时候，我给了十块，他找了零钱。 Mǎi shuǐ de shíhou, wǒ gěi le shí kuài, tā zhǎo le língqián.
ex_zh: When I bought water, I gave ten dollars and he gave me change.

quote_en: 我家邻居很友好。 Wǒ jiā línjū hěn yǒuhǎo.
quote_zh: My neighbour is very friendly.
ex_en: 邻居家的小狗很可爱。我经常和它玩。 Línjū jiā de xiǎo gǒu hěn kě'ài. Wǒ jīngcháng hé tā wán.
ex_zh: The neighbour's little dog is very cute. I often play with it.

def_en: to be in the rain, to get caught in the rain
quote_en: 昨天我淋雨了。 Zuótiān wǒ línyǔ le.
quote_zh: I got caught in the rain yesterday.
ex_en: 出门要带伞，不然会淋雨。感冒就不好了。 Chūmén yào dài sǎn, bùrán huì línyǔ. Gǎnmào jiù bù hǎo le.
ex_zh: Bring an umbrella when going out, otherwise you'll get caught in the rain. Catching a cold is not good.

quote_en: 龙是中国的吉祥物。 Lóng shì Zhōngguó de jíxiángwù.
quote_zh: The dragon is a Chinese auspicious symbol.
ex_en: 龙年出生的孩子很多。大家都觉得龙年好。 Lóng nián chūshēng de háizi hěnduō. Dàjiā dōu juéde lóng nián hǎo.
ex_zh: Many children are born in the Year of the Dragon. Everyone thinks the dragon year is good.

quote_en: 我们暑假去旅游。 Wǒmen shǔjià qù lǚyóu.
quote_zh: We're traveling during the summer holiday.
ex_en: 新西兰是旅游的好地方。很多游客来南岛。 Xīnxīlán shì lǚyóu de hǎo dìfang. Hěnduō yóukè lái Nándǎo.
ex_zh: New Zealand is a great place for travel. Many tourists come to the South Island.

quote_en: 新西兰在南半球。 Xīnxīlán zài nánbànqiú.
quote_zh: New Zealand is in the southern hemisphere.
ex_en: 南半球和北半球的季节相反。这里夏天时，中国是冬天。 Nánbànqiú hé běibànqiú de jìjié xiāngfǎn. Zhèlǐ xiàtiān shí, Zhōngguó shì dōngtiān.
ex_zh: The seasons in the southern and northern hemispheres are opposite. When it's summer here, it's winter in China.

quote_en: 中国南方很热。 Zhōngguó nánfāng hěn rè.
quote_zh: Southern China is very hot.
ex_en: 新西兰的南岛比北岛冷。南方冬天会下雪。 Xīnxīlán de Nándǎo bǐ Běidǎo lěng. Nánfāng dōngtiān huì xià xuě.
ex_zh: The South Island of New Zealand is colder than the North Island. The south gets snow in winter.

quote_en: 听到这个消息，我很难过。 Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, wǒ hěn nánguò.
quote_zh: I felt very sad when I heard this news.
ex_en: 朋友要搬家了，我很舍不得，心里很难过。 Péngyou yào bānjiā le, wǒ hěn shěbude, xīnli hěn nánguò.
ex_zh: My friend is moving away; I'm really reluctant and feel very sad.

quote_en: 天上有鸟在飞。 Tiān shàng yǒu niǎo zài fēi.
quote_zh: Birds are flying in the sky.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多鸟，比如kiwi鸟。它们是国鸟。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō niǎo, bǐrú kiwi niǎo. Tāmen shì guó niǎo.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many birds, such as the kiwi. It is the national bird.

quote_en: 她怕黑。 Tā pà hēi.
quote_zh: She is afraid of the dark.
ex_en: 我小时候怕打雷。现在不怕了。 Wǒ xiǎoshíhou pà dǎléi. Xiànzài bù pà le.
ex_zh: When I was little I was afraid of thunder. Now I'm not.

quote_en: 我很期待明天的旅行。 Wǒ hěn qīdài míngtiān de lǚxíng.
quote_zh: I'm looking forward to tomorrow's trip.
ex_en: 放假了，我很期待和朋友们一起玩。 Fàngjià le, wǒ hěn qīdài hé péngyoumen yìqǐ wán.
ex_zh: It's holiday; I'm really looking forward to playing with my friends.

quote_en: 期末快到了。 Qīmò kuài dào le.
quote_zh: The end of term is coming soon.
ex_en: 期末要好好复习，争取考个好成绩。 Qīmò yào hǎohǎo fùxí, zhēngqǔ kǎo ge hǎo chéngjì.
ex_zh: At the end of term you need to review well, to get a good result.

quote_en: 去中国要办签证。 Qù Zhōngguó yào bàn qiānzhèng.
quote_zh: You need a visa to go to China.
ex_en: 我拿到了去中国的签证。可以准备出发了。 Wǒ ná dào le qù Zhōngguó de qiānzhèng. Kěyǐ zhǔnbèi chūfā le.
ex_zh: I got my visa for China. I can prepare to depart.

quote_en: 她对人很亲切。 Tā duì rén hěn qīnqiè.
quote_zh: She is very kind to people.
ex_en: 新西兰的人很亲切。他们总是微笑。 Xīnxīlán de rén hěn qīnqiè. Tāmen zǒngshì wēixiào.
ex_zh: New Zealanders are very kind. They always smile.

quote_en: 今天是晴天。 Jīntiān shì qíngtiān.
quote_zh: It's a sunny day today.
ex_en: 晴天的时候，我们去海边玩。太阳很大。 Qíngtiān de shíhou, wǒmen qù hǎibiān wán. Tàiyáng hěn dà.
ex_zh: On sunny days we go to the seaside. The sun is very strong.

quote_en: 我们学校有篮球队。 Wǒmen xuéxiào yǒu lánqiú duì.
quote_zh: Our school has a basketball team.
ex_en: 全黑队是新西兰最好的球队。他们很厉害。 Quánhēiduì shì Xīnxīlán zuì hǎo de qiúduì. Tāmen hěn lìhai.
ex_zh: The All Blacks are New Zealand's best team. They are very strong.

quote_en: 这是一个全国性的比赛。 Zhè shì yí ge quánguó xìng de bǐsài.
quote_zh: This is a nationwide competition.
ex_en: 我们学校参加了全国的比赛，取得了好成绩。 Wǒmen xuéxiào cānjiā le quánguó de bǐsài, qǔdé le hǎo chéngjì.
ex_zh: Our school participated in the national competition and achieved good results.

def_zh: 全黑队比赛；支持全黑队
quote_en: 全黑队赢了比赛。 Quánhēiduì yíng le bǐsài.
quote_zh: The All Blacks won the match.
ex_en: 新西兰人很喜欢全黑队。每次比赛大家都很兴奋。 Xīnxīlán rén hěn xǐhuan Quánhēiduì. Měi cì bǐsài dàjiā dōu hěn xìngfèn.
ex_zh: New Zealanders really like the All Blacks. Everyone gets excited for every match.

quote_en: 我们全家去旅行。 Wǒmen quánjiā qù lǚxíng.
quote_zh: Our whole family is going on a trip.
ex_en: 春节的时候，全家一起吃年夜饭。很热闹。 Chūnjié de shíhou, quánjiā yìqǐ chī niányèfàn. Hěn rènao.
ex_zh: During Spring Festival, the whole family eats New Year's Eve dinner together. It's very lively.

quote_en: 请让一下。 Qǐng ràng yīxià.
quote_zh: Please let me through.
ex_en: 在公交车上，年轻人应该给老人让座。 Zài gōngjiāochē shàng, niánqīng rén yīnggāi gěi lǎorén ràng zuò.
ex_zh: On the bus, young people should give up their seats to the elderly.

quote_en: 中国人口很多。 Zhōngguó rénkǒu hěnduō.
quote_zh: China has a large population.
ex_en: 新西兰人口不多，但是羊很多。 Xīnxīlán rénkǒu bù duō, dànshì yáng hěnduō.
ex_zh: New Zealand's population is not large, but there are many sheep.

quote_en: 人们喜欢去公园散步。 Rénmen xǐhuan qù gōngyuán sànbù.
quote_zh: People like to go for walks in the park.
ex_en: 新西兰的人们很友好，总是说“你好”。 Xīnxīlán de rénmen hěn yǒuhǎo, zǒngshì shuō “nǐ hǎo”.
ex_zh: People in New Zealand are very friendly and always say “hello”.

quote_en: 很高兴认识你。 Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ.
quote_zh: Nice to meet you.
ex_en: 我在学校认识了很多新朋友。他们都很善良。 Wǒ zài xuéxiào rènshi le hěnduō xīn péngyou. Tāmen dōu hěn shànliáng.
ex_zh: I made many new friends at school. They are all very kind.

quote_en: 我认为你说得对。 Wǒ rènwéi nǐ shuō de duì.
quote_zh: I think you are right.
ex_en: 老师认为我们应该每天练习中文。 Lǎoshī rènwéi wǒmen yīnggāi měitiān liànxí Zhōngwén.
ex_zh: The teacher thinks we should practise Chinese every day.

quote_en: 她对人很热情。 Tā duì rén hěn rèqíng.
quote_zh: She is very enthusiastic towards people.
ex_en: 新西兰人很热情。游客来了他们都很欢迎。 Xīnxīlán rén hěn rèqíng. Yóukè lái le tāmen dōu hěn huānyíng.
ex_zh: New Zealanders are very enthusiastic. They welcome tourists warmly.

quote_en: 晚饭后我们去散步。 Wǎnfàn hòu wǒmen qù sànbù.
quote_zh: After dinner we go for a walk.
ex_en: 周末我喜欢在海边散步。空气很好，心情也好。 Zhōumò wǒ xǐhuan zài hǎibiān sànbù. Kōngqì hěn hǎo, xīnqíng yě hǎo.
ex_zh: On weekends I like to walk by the seaside. The air is fresh and the mood is good.

quote_en: 只有少数同学没交作业。 Zhǐyǒu shǎoshù tóngxué méi jiāo zuòyè.
quote_zh: Only a small number of students didn't hand in homework.
ex_en: 班上少数人会说中文。他们学了很久。 Bān shàng shǎoshù rén huì shuō Zhōngwén. Tāmen xué le hěn jiǔ.
ex_zh: A minority in the class can speak Chinese. They have been learning for a long time.

quote_en: 我不喜欢蛇。 Wǒ bù xǐhuan shé.
quote_zh: I don't like snakes.
ex_en: 新西兰没有蛇。很多人觉得这样很安全。 Xīnxīlán méiyǒu shé. Hěnduō rén juéde zhèyàng hěn ānquán.
ex_zh: New Zealand has no snakes. Many people think that's very safe.

quote_en: 我们社区很干净。 Wǒmen shèqū hěn gānjìng.
quote_zh: Our community is very clean.
ex_en: 周末社区有活动，很多邻居都去参加。 Zhōumò shèqū yǒu huódòng, hěnduō línjū dōu qù cānjiā.
ex_zh: On weekends the community has activities, and many neighbours go to participate.

quote_en: 今天学了很多生词。 Jīntiān xué le hěnduō shēngcí.
quote_zh: We learned many new words today.
ex_en: 生词要多读多写。这样才能记住。 Shēngcí yào duō dú duō xiě. Zhèyàng cái néng jìzhù.
ex_zh: New words need to be read and written often. Only then can you remember them.

quote_en: 圣诞节快到了。 Shèngdànjié kuài dào le.
quote_zh: Christmas is coming soon.
ex_en: 新西兰的圣诞节在夏天。大家喜欢去海边。 Xīnxīlán de Shèngdànjié zài xiàtiān. Dàjiā xǐhuan qù hǎibiān.
ex_zh: Christmas in New Zealand is in summer. Everyone likes to go to the seaside.

quote_en: 我的学校生活很快乐。 Wǒ de xuéxiào shēnghuó hěn kuàilè.
quote_zh: My school life is very happy.
ex_en: 新西兰的生活很安静。我喜欢这里。 Xīnxīlán de shēnghuó hěn ānjìng. Wǒ xǐhuan zhèlǐ.
ex_zh: Life in New Zealand is very peaceful. I like it here.

quote_en: 考试没考好，我很失望。 Kǎoshì méi kǎo hǎo, wǒ hěn shīwàng.
quote_zh: I was disappointed that I didn't do well on the exam.
ex_en: 失败了不要失望。下次努力就好。 Shībài le bùyào shīwàng. Xià cì nǔlì jiù hǎo.
ex_zh: Don't be disappointed if you fail. Just work hard next time.

quote_en: 我想试一下这件衣服。 Wǒ xiǎng shì yīxià zhè jiàn yīfu.
quote_zh: I want to try on this piece of clothing.
ex_en: 这个菜我没吃过，想试试。如果好吃，下次再点。 Zhège cài wǒ méi chī guò, xiǎng shìshi. Rúguǒ hǎochī, xià cì zài diǎn.
ex_zh: I've never eaten this dish; I want to try it. If it's tasty, I'll order it again next time.

def_zh: 去市中心；市中心很热闹
quote_en: 我家离市中心很近。 Wǒ jiā lí shì zhōngxīn hěn jìn.
quote_zh: My home is very close to the city center.
ex_en: 奥克兰的市中心有很多商店和餐厅。 Yàokèlán de shì zhōngxīn yǒu hěnduō shāngdiàn hé cāntīng.
ex_zh: Auckland's city center has many shops and restaurants.

quote_en: 爸爸送给我一块手表。 Bàba sòng gěi wǒ yí kuài shǒubiǎo.
quote_zh: Dad gave me a watch.
ex_en: 我每天都戴手表。这样就知道时间了。 Wǒ měitiān dōu dài shǒubiǎo. Zhèyàng jiù zhīdào shíjiān le.
ex_zh: I wear a watch every day. That way I know the time.

def_en: to receive (messages, letters, gifts, or delivery)
quote_en: 我收到了朋友的礼物。 Wǒ shōudào le péngyou de lǐwù.
quote_zh: I received a gift from my friend.
ex_en: 你收到我的短信了吗？我昨天发的。 Nǐ shōudào wǒ de duǎnxìn le ma? Wǒ zuótiān fā de.
ex_zh: Did you receive my text message? I sent it yesterday.

quote_en: 学校门口有很多树。 Xuéxiào ménkǒu yǒu hěnduō shù.
quote_zh: There are many trees at the school gate.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多很高的树。公园里到处是树。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō hěn gāo de shù. Gōngyuán lǐ dàochù shì shù.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many tall trees. Parks are full of trees.

quote_en: 我家后面有一片小树林。 Wǒ jiā hòumiàn yǒu yí piàn xiǎo shùlín.
quote_zh: There is a small forest behind my house.
ex_en: 周末我们去树林里散步。空气很新鲜。 Zhōumò wǒmen qù shùlín lǐ sànbù. Kōngqì hěn xīnxiān.
ex_zh: On weekends we go for a walk in the forest. The air is fresh.

quote_en: 李叔叔是我爸爸的弟弟。 Lǐ shūshu shì wǒ bàba de dìdi.
quote_zh: Uncle Li is my dad's younger brother.
ex_en: 叔叔在新西兰住了十年了。他很喜欢这里。 Shūshu zài Xīnxīlán zhù le shí nián le. Tā hěn xǐhuan zhèlǐ.
ex_zh: Uncle has lived in New Zealand for ten years. He really likes it here.

quote_en: 我喜欢喝酸奶。 Wǒ xǐhuan hē suānnǎi.
quote_zh: I like to drink yoghurt.
ex_en: 超市的酸奶有很多口味。我最喜欢草莓味。 Chāoshì de suānnǎi yǒu hěnduō kǒuwèi. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan cǎoméi wèi.
ex_zh: Supermarket yoghurt comes in many flavours. My favourite is strawberry.

quote_en: 今天的太阳很大。 Jīntiān de tàiyáng hěn dà.
quote_zh: The sun is very strong today.
ex_en: 新西兰的太阳很厉害。出门要涂防晒霜。 Xīnxīlán de tàiyáng hěn lìhai. Chūmén yào tú fángshài shuāng.
ex_zh: The sun in New Zealand is very strong. You need to put on sunscreen when going out.

quote_en: 小孩子喜欢吃糖。 Xiǎoháizi xǐhuan chī táng.
quote_zh: Children like to eat candy.
ex_en: 糖吃多了对牙齿不好。要少吃。 Táng chī duō le duì yáchǐ bù hǎo. Yào shǎo chī.
ex_zh: Eating too much candy is bad for your teeth. You should eat less.

quote_en: 今天是个特别的日子。 Jīntiān shì ge tèbié de rìzi.
quote_zh: Today is a special day.
ex_en: 新西兰的风景特别美。我特别喜欢南岛。 Xīnxīlán de fēngjǐng tèbié měi. Wǒ tèbié xǐhuan Nándǎo.
ex_zh: New Zealand's scenery is especially beautiful. I particularly like the South Island.

def_zh: 天安门广场；天安门城楼
quote_en: 天安门在北京。 Tiān'ānmén zài Běijīng.
quote_zh: Tian'anmen is in Beijing.
ex_en: 很多游客去北京都会看天安门。那里很热闹。 Hěnduō yóukè qù Běijīng dōu huì kàn Tiān'ānmén. Nàlǐ hěn rènao.
ex_zh: Many tourists who go to Beijing go to see Tian'anmen. It's very lively there.

quote_en: 饭后我们吃了甜点。 Fàn hòu wǒmen chī le tiándiǎn.
quote_zh: After the meal we had dessert.
ex_en: 这家餐厅的甜点很好吃。我最喜欢蛋糕。 Zhè jiā cāntīng de tiándiǎn hěn hǎochī. Wǒ zuì xǐhuan dàngāo.
ex_zh: The desserts at this restaurant are delicious. I like the cake best.

def_zh: 地下停车场；停车场很大
quote_en: 超市旁边有一个停车场。 Chāoshì pángbiān yǒu yí ge tíngchēchǎng.
quote_zh: There is a car park next to the supermarket.
ex_en: 周末停车场经常没有位置。要早点去。 Zhōumò tíngchēchǎng jīngcháng méiyǒu wèizhi. Yào zǎodiǎn qù.
ex_zh: On weekends the car park often has no spaces. You need to go early.

quote_en: 我们不能同时做两件事。 Wǒmen bùnéng tóngshí zuò liǎng jiàn shì.
quote_zh: We can't do two things at the same time.
ex_en: 他一边听音乐一边写作业。同时做两件事不太好。 Tā yìbiān tīng yīnyuè yìbiān xiě zuòyè. Tóngshí zuò liǎng jiàn shì bù tài hǎo.
ex_zh: He listens to music and does homework at the same time. Doing two things at once isn't very good.

quote_en: 这两本书同样有意思。 Zhè liǎng běn shū tóngyàng yǒuyìsi.
quote_zh: These two books are equally interesting.
ex_en: 学中文和学英语同样重要。都要努力。 Xué Zhōngwén hé xué Yīngyǔ tóngyàng zhòngyào. Dōu yào nǔlì.
ex_zh: Learning Chinese and learning English are equally important. You need to work hard at both.

quote_en: 我同意你的想法。 Wǒ tóngyì nǐ de xiǎngfǎ.
quote_zh: I agree with your idea.
ex_en: 爸爸同意我周末去朋友家玩。我很开心。 Bàba tóngyì wǒ zhōumò qù péngyou jiā wán. Wǒ hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: Dad agreed to let me go to a friend's house on the weekend. I'm very happy.

quote_en: 这次考试我退步了。 Zhè cì kǎoshì wǒ tuìbù le.
quote_zh: I regressed in this exam.
ex_en: 学习要努力，不然会退步。我要加油。 Xuéxí yào nǔlì, bùrán huì tuìbù. Wǒ yào jiāyóu.
ex_zh: You need to work hard at studying, otherwise you'll regress. I'll work harder.

quote_en: 今天不想做饭，我们叫外卖吧。 Jīntiān bù xiǎng zuò fàn, wǒmen jiào wàimài ba.
quote_zh: We don't feel like cooking today; let's order takeaway.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多中餐外卖。周末我常点。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō zhōngcān wàimài. Zhōumò wǒ cháng diǎn.
ex_zh: New Zealand has lots of Chinese takeaway. I often order on weekends.

quote_en: 睡觉前要对爸爸妈妈说晚安。 Shuìjiào qián yào duì bàba māma shuō wǎn'ān.
quote_zh: Before sleeping you should say good night to Mum and Dad.
ex_en: 晚安，明天见！做个好梦。 Wǎn'ān, míngtiān jiàn! Zuò ge hǎo mèng.
ex_zh: Good night, see you tomorrow! Sweet dreams.

quote_en: 我喜欢打网球。 Wǒ xǐhuan dǎ wǎngqiú.
quote_zh: I like playing tennis.
ex_en: 学校有网球场。放学后我和同学去打网球。 Xuéxiào yǒu wǎngqiú chǎng. Fàngxué hòu wǒ hé tóngxué qù dǎ wǎngqiú.
ex_zh: The school has a tennis court. After school I play tennis with classmates.

quote_en: 这个网站可以学中文。 Zhège wǎngzhàn kěyǐ xué Zhōngwén.
quote_zh: This website can be used to learn Chinese.
ex_en: 很多网站有中文课。我在网上学。 Hěnduō wǎngzhàn yǒu Zhōngwén kè. Wǒ zài wǎngshàng xué.
ex_zh: Many websites have Chinese lessons. I study online.

quote_en: 学校举办了新年晚会。 Xuéxiào jǔbàn le xīnnián wǎnhuì.
quote_zh: The school held a New Year's evening party.
ex_en: 晚会上大家唱歌跳舞。玩得很开心。 Wǎnhuì shàng dàjiā chànggē tiàowǔ. Wán de hěn kāixīn.
ex_zh: At the party everyone sang and danced. We had a lot of fun.

quote_en: 冬天要穿厚袜子。 Dōngtiān yào chuān hòu wàzi.
quote_zh: In winter you need to wear thick socks.
ex_en: 妈妈给我买了一双新袜子。是蓝色的。 Māma gěi wǒ mǎi le yì shuāng xīn wàzi. Shì lán sè de.
ex_zh: Mum bought me a new pair of socks. They are blue.

quote_en: 今天的温度是二十度。 Jīntiān de wēndù shì èrshí dù.
quote_zh: Today's temperature is twenty degrees.
ex_en: 新西兰夏天的温度不高。很舒服。 Xīnxīlán xiàtiān de wēndù bù gāo. Hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: The temperature in New Zealand in summer isn't high. It's very comfortable.

quote_en: 你有什么问题吗？ Nǐ yǒu shénme wèntí ma?
quote_zh: Do you have any questions?
ex_en: 学习中有问题要问老师。不要怕。 Xuéxí zhōng yǒu wèntí yào wèn lǎoshī. Bùyào pà.
ex_zh: If you have questions while studying, ask the teacher. Don't be afraid.

quote_en: 中午我们有午休时间。 Zhōngwǔ wǒmen yǒu wǔxiū shíjiān.
quote_zh: We have a lunch break at noon.
ex_en: 午休的时候，有的同学睡觉，有的看书。 Wǔxiū de shíhou, yǒu de tóngxué shuìjiào, yǒu de kàn shū.
ex_zh: During the lunch break, some students sleep, some read.

quote_en: 这个菜有点咸。 Zhège cài yǒudiǎn xián.
quote_zh: This dish is a little salty.
ex_en: 盐放多了就会咸。下次少放点。 Yán fàng duō le jiù huì xián. Xià cì shǎo fàng diǎn.
ex_zh: If you put too much salt, it becomes salty. Next time put less.

quote_en: 妈妈做的饭很香。 Māma zuò de fàn hěn xiāng.
quote_zh: Mum's cooking smells delicious.
ex_en: 花开了，院子里很香。我喜欢这个味道。 Huā kāi le, yuànzi lǐ hěn xiāng. Wǒ xǐhuan zhège wèidào.
ex_zh: The flowers have bloomed; the yard smells fragrant. I like this scent.

def_en: to remember with longing, to miss
quote_en: 我很想念我的家乡。 Wǒ hěn xiǎngniàn wǒ de jiāxiāng.
quote_zh: I miss my hometown very much.
ex_en: 离开家久了，会想念爸爸妈妈。 Líkāi jiā jiǔ le, huì xiǎngniàn bàba māma.
ex_zh: When you've been away from home for a long time, you miss Mum and Dad.

quote_en: 第一次离开家，我有点想家。 Dì yī cì líkāi jiā, wǒ yǒudiǎn xiǎng jiā.
quote_zh: The first time I left home, I felt a bit homesick.
ex_en: 给家人打电话就不会那么想家了。 Gěi jiārén dǎ diànhuà jiù bù huì nàme xiǎng jiā le.
ex_zh: Calling family makes you less homesick.

def_zh: 相同的地方；相同的意思
quote_en: 我们俩的爱好相同。 Wǒmen liǎ de àihào xiāngtóng.
quote_zh: Our hobbies are the same.
ex_en: 这两件衣服颜色相同，大小不同。 Zhè liǎng jiàn yīfu yánsè xiāngtóng, dàxiǎo bùtóng.
ex_zh: These two clothes have the same colour but different sizes.

quote_en: 我相信你一定能成功。 Wǒ xiāngxìn nǐ yídìng néng chénggōng.
quote_zh: I believe you will succeed.
ex_en: 老师相信我们，我们也要相信自己。 Lǎoshī xiāngxìn wǒmen, wǒmen yě yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ.
ex_zh: The teacher believes in us; we should also believe in ourselves.

quote_en: 他这个人很小气。 Tā zhège rén hěn xiǎoqì.
quote_zh: He is a very stingy person.
ex_en: 朋友之间不要太小气。要互相帮助。 Péngyou zhī jiān bùyào tài xiǎoqì. Yào hùxiāng bāngzhù.
ex_zh: Don't be too stingy among friends. You should help each other.

quote_en: 路上小心。 Lùshàng xiǎoxīn.
quote_zh: Be careful on the road.
ex_en: 开车要小心，注意安全。下雨天更要小心。 Kāichē yào xiǎoxīn, zhùyì ānquán. Xià yǔ tiān gèng yào xiǎoxīn.
ex_zh: Drive carefully and stay safe. Be even more careful on rainy days.

quote_en: 校长在开会。 Xiàozhǎng zài kāihuì.
quote_zh: The principal is in a meeting.
ex_en: 今天校长给我们讲了话。我们都很认真听。 Jīntiān xiàozhǎng gěi wǒmen jiǎng le huà. Wǒmen dōu hěn rènzhēn tīng.
ex_zh: Today the principal gave us a speech. We all listened carefully.

quote_en: 这双鞋很舒服。 Zhè shuāng xié hěn shūfu.
quote_zh: These shoes are very comfortable.
ex_en: 新西兰人喜欢光脚走路。有时候不穿鞋。 Xīnxīlán rén xǐhuan guāng jiǎo zǒulù. Yǒu shíhou bù chuān xié.
ex_zh: New Zealanders like to walk barefoot. Sometimes they don't wear shoes.

quote_en: 我对考试很有信心。 Wǒ duì kǎoshì hěn yǒu xìnxīn.
quote_zh: I have confidence in the exam.
ex_en: 失败没关系，要有信心继续努力。 Shībài méi guānxi, yào yǒu xìnxīn jìxù nǔlì.
ex_zh: Failure is okay; you need confidence to keep working hard.

quote_en: 晚上可以看到很多星星。 Wǎnshàng kěyǐ kàndào hěnduō xīngxing.
quote_zh: At night you can see many stars.
ex_en: 新西兰的夜空很美。星星特别亮。 Xīnxīlán de yèkōng hěn měi. Xīngxing tèbié liàng.
ex_zh: The night sky in New Zealand is very beautiful. The stars are especially bright.

quote_en: 我收拾好了行李。 Wǒ shōushi hǎo le xínglǐ.
quote_zh: I've packed my luggage.
ex_en: 去旅游不要带太多行李。一个箱子就够了。 Qù lǚyóu bùyào dài tài duō xínglǐ. Yí ge xiāngzi jiù gòu le.
ex_zh: When traveling, don't take too much luggage. One suitcase is enough.

quote_en: 明天去旅行，我很兴奋。 Míngtiān qù lǚxíng, wǒ hěn xìngfèn.
quote_zh: I'm very excited to travel tomorrow.
ex_en: 听到这个消息，大家都很兴奋。太开心了！ Tīng dào zhège xiāoxi, dàjiā dōu hěn xìngfèn. Tài kāixīn le!
ex_zh: Hearing this news, everyone was very excited. So happy!

def_zh: 兄弟姐妹多；我的兄弟姐妹
quote_en: 你有兄弟姐妹吗？ Nǐ yǒu xiōngdì jiěmèi ma?
quote_zh: Do you have any siblings?
ex_en: 我没有兄弟姐妹。但是有很多好朋友。 Wǒ méiyǒu xiōngdì jiěmèi. Dànshì yǒu hěnduō hǎo péngyou.
ex_zh: I don't have any siblings. But I have many good friends.

quote_en: 生病了可以看西医。 Shēngbìng le kěyǐ kàn xīyī.
quote_zh: When you're sick you can see a Western medicine doctor.
ex_en: 中医和西医不一样。各有各的好处。 Zhōngyī hé xīyī bù yíyàng. Gè yǒu gè de hǎochù.
ex_zh: Chinese medicine and Western medicine are different. Each has its own benefits.

quote_en: 我每天都要洗澡。 Wǒ měitiān dōu yào xǐzǎo.
quote_zh: I shower every day.
ex_en: 运动以后洗澡很舒服。身体也干净。 Yùndòng yǐhòu xǐzǎo hěn shūfu. Shēntǐ yě gānjìng.
ex_zh: Showering after exercise feels comfortable, and your body is clean.

quote_en: 开学了，我们要选课。 Kāixué le, wǒmen yào xuǎnkè.
quote_zh: School has started; we need to choose subjects.
ex_en: 高中的课很多。选课要好好想。 Gāozhōng de kè hěnduō. Xuǎnkè yào hǎohǎo xiǎng.
ex_zh: High school has many subjects. Choosing subjects requires careful thought.

quote_en: 这个学期我学了很多。 Zhège xuéqī wǒ xué le hěnduō.
quote_zh: This term I learned a lot.
ex_en: 下学期我要更加努力学习。 Xià xuéqī wǒ yào gèngjiā nǔlì xuéxí.
ex_zh: Next term I will study even harder.

quote_en: 每天都要刷牙。 Měitiān dōu yào shuā yá.
quote_zh: You need to brush your teeth every day.
ex_en: 糖吃多了牙会疼。要少吃。 Táng chī duō le yá huì téng. Yào shǎo chī.
ex_zh: Eating too much candy makes your teeth hurt. You should eat less.

quote_en: 我的牙疼，要去看牙医。 Wǒ de yá téng, yào qù kàn yáyī.
quote_zh: My tooth hurts; I need to see a dentist.
ex_en: 每年要去看一次牙医。检查牙齿。 Měinián yào qù kàn yí cì yáyī. Jiǎnchá yáchǐ.
ex_zh: You should see a dentist once a year to check your teeth.

quote_en: 她的眼睛很大。 Tā de yǎnjing hěn dà.
quote_zh: Her eyes are very big.
ex_en: 看书时间长了眼睛会累。要休息一下。 Kàn shū shíjiān cháng le yǎnjing huì lèi. Yào xiūxi yíxià.
ex_zh: Reading for a long time makes your eyes tired. You need to rest.

quote_en: 你喜欢什么颜色？ Nǐ xǐhuan shénme yánsè?
quote_zh: What colour do you like?
ex_en: 新西兰的国旗是蓝色和红色的。 Xīnxīlán de guóqí shì lán sè hé hóng sè de.
ex_zh: The New Zealand flag is blue and red.

quote_en: 周末我们去公园野餐。 Zhōumò wǒmen qù gōngyuán yěcān.
quote_zh: We're going for a picnic in the park on the weekend.
ex_en: 野餐要带很多好吃的。还要带毯子。 Yěcān yào dài hěnduō hǎochī de. Hái yào dài tǎnzi.
ex_zh: For a picnic you need to bring lots of tasty food, and also a blanket.

quote_en: 我一定来。 Wǒ yídìng lái.
quote_zh: I will definitely come.
ex_en: 学习一定要认真。这样才能进步。 Xuéxí yídìng yào rènzhēn. Zhèyàng cái néng jìnbù.
ex_zh: You must study seriously. Only then can you make progress.

quote_en: 我们等一会儿吧。 Wǒmen děng yíhuìr ba.
quote_zh: Let's wait for a while.
ex_en: 你先休息一会儿。然后我们一起写作业。 Nǐ xiān xiūxi yíhuìr. Ránhòu wǒmen yìqǐ xiě zuòyè.
ex_zh: You rest for a while first. Then we'll do homework together.

quote_en: 中国有十四亿人口。 Zhōngguó yǒu shísì yì rénkǒu.
quote_zh: China has a population of 1.4 billion.
ex_en: 一亿是一万个一万。很大的数字。 Yí yì shì yí wàn ge yí wàn. Hěn dà de shùzì.
ex_zh: One hundred million is ten thousand times ten thousand. A very large number.

quote_en: 他一直学习到晚上。 Tā yìzhí xuéxí dào wǎnshàng.
quote_zh: He studied all the way until evening.
ex_en: 我一直很喜欢中文。学了好几年了。 Wǒ yìzhí hěn xǐhuan Zhōngwén. Xué le hǎo jǐ nián le.
ex_zh: I've always liked Chinese. I've been learning for several years.

quote_en: 教室里有很多椅子。 Jiàoshì lǐ yǒu hěnduō yǐzi.
quote_zh: There are many chairs in the classroom.
ex_en: 这把椅子坐着很舒服。我想买一把。 Zhè bǎ yǐzi zuò zhe hěn shūfu. Wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì bǎ.
ex_zh: This chair is comfortable to sit on. I want to buy one.

quote_en: 今天阴天，没有太阳。 Jīntiān yīntiān, méiyǒu tàiyáng.
quote_zh: It's overcast today; there's no sun.
ex_en: 阴天的时候，天气有点凉。要穿外套。 Yīntiān de shíhou, tiānqì yǒudiǎn liáng. Yào chuān wàitào.
ex_zh: When it's overcast, the weather is a bit cool. You need to wear a jacket.

quote_en: 手机影响学习。 Shǒujī yǐngxiǎng xuéxí.
quote_zh: Mobile phones affect studies.
ex_en: 天气会影响心情。晴天让人开心。 Tiānqì huì yǐngxiǎng xīnqíng. Qíngtiān ràng rén kāixīn.
ex_zh: Weather can affect mood. Sunny days make people happy.

quote_en: 我去银行取钱。 Wǒ qù yínháng qǔ qián.
quote_zh: I'm going to the bank to withdraw money.
ex_en: 银行周末不开门。平时要去办事情。 Yínháng zhōumò bù kāimén. Píngshí yào qù bàn shìqing.
ex_zh: Banks are not open on weekends. You need to go on weekdays to do business.

quote_en: 新西兰有很多游客。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō yóukè.
quote_zh: New Zealand has many tourists.
ex_en: 游客喜欢去皇后镇旅游。那里风景很美。 Yóukè xǐhuan qù Huánghòu Zhèn lǚyóu. Nàlǐ fēngjǐng hěn měi.
ex_zh: Tourists like to travel to Queenstown. The scenery there is beautiful.

quote_en: 你有空儿吗？ Nǐ yǒu kòngr ma?
quote_zh: Do you have free time?
ex_en: 周末有空儿的话，我们一起去看电影。 Zhōumò yǒu kòngr dehuà, wǒmen yìqǐ qù kàn diànyǐng.
ex_zh: If you're free on the weekend, let's go to the movies together.

quote_en: 新西兰人很友善。 Xīnxīlán rén hěn yǒushàn.
quote_zh: New Zealanders are very friendly.
ex_en: 我的邻居很友善。我们经常聊天。 Wǒ de línjū hěn yǒushàn. Wǒmen jīngcháng liáotiān.
ex_zh: My neighbour is very friendly. We often chat.

quote_en: 原来他是你的哥哥。 Yuánlái tā shì nǐ de gēge.
quote_zh: So he is your older brother.
ex_en: 原来新西兰也有中餐。太好吃了。 Yuánlái Xīnxīlán yě yǒu zhōngcān. Tài hǎochī le.
ex_zh: It turns out New Zealand also has Chinese food. So delicious!

quote_en: 你愿意来我家玩吗？ Nǐ yuànyì lái wǒ jiā wán ma?
quote_zh: Are you willing to come to my house to play?
ex_en: 我愿意帮助同学。大家互相帮助。 Wǒ yuànyì bāngzhù tóngxué. Dàjiā hùxiāng bāngzhù.
ex_zh: I am willing to help classmates. Everyone helps each other.

quote_en: 今晚的月亮很圆。 Jīnwǎn de yuèliang hěn yuán.
quote_zh: The moon is very round tonight.
ex_en: 中秋节的时候，大家看月亮吃月饼。 Zhōngqiūjié de shíhou, dàjiā kàn yuèliang chī yuèbǐng.
ex_zh: During the Mid‑Autumn Festival, people watch the moon and eat mooncakes.

quote_en: 中文是一种语言。 Zhōngwén shì yì zhǒng yǔyán.
quote_zh: Chinese is a language.
ex_en: 多学一种语言很好。可以去更多地方。 Duō xué yì zhǒng yǔyán hěn hǎo. Kěyǐ qù gèng duō dìfang.
ex_zh: Learning another language is good. You can go to more places.

quote_en: 衣服脏了要洗。 Yīfu zāng le yào xǐ.
quote_zh: Clothes need washing when they're dirty.
ex_en: 地上很脏，不要坐在地上。 Dìshàng hěn zāng, bùyào zuò zài dìshàng.
ex_zh: The floor is dirty, don't sit on the floor.

def_en: to grow, leader of a team
quote_en: 孩子长大了。 Háizi zhǎng dà le.
quote_zh: The child has grown up.
ex_en: 我们班的班长很负责。大家都很喜欢他。 Wǒmen bān de bānzhǎng hěn fùzé. Dàjiā dōu hěn xǐhuan tā.
ex_zh: Our class monitor is very responsible. Everyone likes him.

def_en: to look for, to give change
quote_en: 我在找我的手机。 Wǒ zài zhǎo wǒ de shǒujī.
quote_zh: I'm looking for my phone.
ex_en: 买东西给了五十块，他找了我二十块。 Mǎi dōngxi gěi le wǔshí kuài, tā zhǎo le wǒ èrshí kuài.
ex_zh: I gave fifty dollars for the purchase; he gave me twenty dollars change.

def_en: to take care of, to look after
quote_en: 妈妈照顾我们很辛苦。 Māma zhàogù wǒmen hěn xīnkǔ.
quote_zh: Mum works hard taking care of us.
ex_en: 我要好好照顾妹妹。她比我小。 Wǒ yào hǎohǎo zhàogù mèimei. Tā bǐ wǒ xiǎo.
ex_zh: I need to take good care of my younger sister. She's younger than me.

quote_en: 这张照片很漂亮。 Zhè zhāng zhàopiàn hěn piàoliang.
quote_zh: This photo is very beautiful.
ex_en: 旅游的时候我拍了很多照片。都很好。 Lǚyóu de shíhou wǒ pāi le hěnduō zhàopiàn. Dōu hěn hǎo.
ex_zh: I took many photos during the trip. They're all good.

quote_en: 我们一起照张相吧。 Wǒmen yìqǐ zhào zhāng xiàng ba.
quote_zh: Let's take a photo together.
ex_en: 毕业的时候，全班一起照相。 Bìyè de shíhou, quánbān yìqǐ zhàoxiàng.
ex_zh: At graduation, the whole class took a photo together.

quote_en: 爸爸工作挣钱很辛苦。 Bàba gōngzuò zhèngqián hěn xīnkǔ.
quote_zh: Dad works hard to earn money.
ex_en: 暑假我可以打工挣钱。然后去旅游。 Shǔjià wǒ kěyǐ dǎgōng zhèngqián. Ránhòu qù lǚyóu.
ex_zh: During the summer holiday I can work part-time to earn money. Then I'll travel.

quote_en: 中医在中国很流行。 Zhōngyī zài Zhōngguó hěn liúxíng.
quote_zh: Chinese medicine is very popular in China.
ex_en: 我生病的时候看中医。喝中药好多了。 Wǒ shēngbìng de shíhou kàn zhōngyī. Hē zhōngyào hǎo duō le.
ex_zh: When I was sick I saw a Chinese medicine doctor. After drinking the herbal medicine, I felt much better.

quote_en: 猪很可爱。 Zhū hěn kě'ài.
quote_zh: Pigs are very cute.
ex_en: 猪肉可以做很多菜。我喜欢吃猪肉。 Zhūròu kěyǐ zuò hěnduō cài. Wǒ xǐhuan chī zhūròu.
ex_zh: Pork can be made into many dishes. I like eating pork.

quote_en: 祝你生日快乐！ Zhù nǐ shēngrì kuàilè!
quote_zh: Happy birthday to you!
ex_en: 祝你考试成功！我相信你一定行。 Zhù nǐ kǎoshì chénggōng! Wǒ xiāngxìn nǐ yídìng xíng.
ex_zh: I wish you success in your exam! I believe you can do it.

quote_en: 我的桌子上有很多书。 Wǒ de zhuōzi shàng yǒu hěnduō shū.
quote_zh: There are many books on my desk.
ex_en: 吃饭的时候，全家坐在桌子旁。 Chīfàn de shíhou, quánjiā zuò zài zhuōzi páng.
ex_zh: When eating, the whole family sits at the table.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃猪肉。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī zhūròu.
quote_zh: I like eating pork.
ex_en: 猪肉饺子很好吃。妈妈经常做。 Zhūròu jiǎozi hěn hǎochī. Māma jīngcháng zuò.
ex_zh: Pork dumplings are very tasty. Mum often makes them.

quote_en: 我有一本中文字典。 Wǒ yǒu yì běn Zhōngwén zìdiǎn.
quote_zh: I have a Chinese dictionary.
ex_en: 遇到生词可以查字典。很方便。 Yùdào shēngcí kěyǐ chá zìdiǎn. Hěn fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: When you come across new words, you can look them up in a dictionary. Very convenient.

quote_en: 学校有作息时间表。 Xuéxiào yǒu zuòxī shíjiān biǎo.
quote_zh: The school has a daily schedule.
ex_en: 早睡早起，作息时间规律对身体好。 Zǎoshuì zǎoqǐ, zuòxī shíjiān guīlǜ duì shēntǐ hǎo.
ex_zh: Going to bed early and getting up early, having a regular schedule, is good for health.

quote_en: 我每天都要写作业。 Wǒ měitiān dōu yào xiě zuòyè.
quote_zh: I have to do homework every day.
ex_en: 作业写完了才能看电视。这是规矩。 Zuòyè xiě wán le cái néng kàn diànshì. Zhè shì guīju.
ex_zh: You can watch TV only after finishing homework. That's the rule.

quote_en: 我们要尊敬祖先。 Wǒmen yào zūnjìng zǔxiān.
quote_zh: We should respect our ancestors.
ex_en: 新西兰的毛利人有很长的祖先历史。 Xīnxīlán de Máolì rén yǒu hěn cháng de zǔxiān lìshǐ.
ex_zh: Māori people in New Zealand have a long history of ancestors.

quote_en: 我要一杯咖啡。 Wǒ yào yì bēi kāfēi.
quote_zh: I'd like a cup of coffee.
ex_en: 早上喝一杯牛奶对身体好。我喜欢热牛奶。 Zǎoshang hē yì bēi niúnǎi duì shēntǐ hǎo. Wǒ xǐhuan rè niúnǎi.
ex_zh: Drinking a cup of milk in the morning is good for health. I like hot milk.

quote_en: 我去过一次中国。 Wǒ qù guò yí cì Zhōngguó.
quote_zh: I've been to China once.
ex_en: 每天运动两次，身体会更好。 Měitiān yùndòng liǎng cì, shēntǐ huì gèng hǎo.
ex_zh: Exercising twice a day will make you healthier.

def_en: counter for events, performances, or certain activities
quote_en: 下午有一场足球比赛。 Xiàwǔ yǒu yì chǎng zúqiú bǐsài.
quote_zh: There's a soccer match this afternoon.
ex_en: 昨天一场大雨，把地都淋湿了。 Zuótiān yì chǎng dàyǔ, bǎ dì dōu lín shī le.
ex_zh: Yesterday a heavy rain soaked the ground.

quote_en: 我家附近有一家超市。 Wǒ jiā fùjìn yǒu yì jiā chāoshì.
quote_zh: There is a supermarket near my home.
ex_en: 这家餐厅的菜很好吃。我们经常去。 Zhè jiā cāntīng de cài hěn hǎochī. Wǒmen jīngcháng qù.
ex_zh: This restaurant's food is delicious. We often go.

quote_en: 我爸爸有一辆黑色的车。 Wǒ bàba yǒu yí liàng hēisè de chē.
quote_zh: My dad has a black car.
ex_en: 学校门口停了很多辆校车。 Xuéxiào ménkǒu tíng le hěnduō liàng xiàochē.
ex_zh: Many school buses are parked at the school gate.

quote_en: 我们点了两盘饺子。 Wǒmen diǎn le liǎng pán jiǎozi.
quote_zh: We ordered two plates of dumplings.
ex_en: 妈妈做了一盘炒饭。很好吃。 Māma zuò le yì pán chǎofàn. Hěn hǎochī.
ex_zh: Mum made a plate of fried rice. It was delicious.

quote_en: 我吃了一片面包。 Wǒ chī le yí piàn miànbāo.
quote_zh: I ate a slice of bread.
ex_en: 地上有一片树叶，很漂亮。 Dìshàng yǒu yí piàn shùyè, hěn piàoliang.
ex_zh: There is a leaf on the ground, very beautiful.

quote_en: 我买了一瓶水。 Wǒ mǎi le yì píng shuǐ.
quote_zh: I bought a bottle of water.
ex_en: 冰箱里有一瓶酸奶。你想喝吗？ Bīngxiāng lǐ yǒu yì píng suānnǎi. Nǐ xiǎng hē ma?
ex_zh: There's a bottle of yoghurt in the fridge. Do you want some?

quote_en: 我买了一双新鞋子。 Wǒ mǎi le yì shuāng xīn xiézi.
quote_zh: I bought a new pair of shoes.
ex_en: 一双筷子怎么用？你要学一学。 Yì shuāng kuàizi zěnme yòng? Nǐ yào xué yì xué.
ex_zh: How do you use a pair of chopsticks? You need to learn.

quote_en: 农场里有一头牛。 Nóngchǎng lǐ yǒu yì tóu niú.
quote_zh: There is a cow on the farm.
ex_en: 新西兰有很多头羊。比人多。 Xīnxīlán yǒu hěnduō tóu yáng. Bǐ rén duō.
ex_zh: New Zealand has many sheep. More than people.

quote_en: 我吃了一碗面条。 Wǒ chī le yì wǎn miàntiáo.
quote_zh: I ate a bowl of noodles.
ex_en: 早上喝一碗粥，很舒服。 Zǎoshang hē yì wǎn zhōu, hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: Drinking a bowl of porridge in the morning is comfortable.

def_en: polite counter for number of people
quote_en: 我们班有三位老师。 Wǒmen bān yǒu sān wèi lǎoshī.
quote_zh: Our class has three teachers.
ex_en: 餐厅来了几位客人。服务员去招呼了。 Cāntīng lái le jǐ wèi kèrén. Fúwùyuán qù zhāohu le.
ex_zh: A few guests arrived at the restaurant. The waiter went to attend to them.

quote_en: 我有一支蓝色的笔。 Wǒ yǒu yì zhī lán sè de bǐ.
quote_zh: I have a blue pen.
ex_en: 老师给了我一支铅笔，让我写字。 Lǎoshī gěi le wǒ yì zhī qiānbǐ, ràng wǒ xiě zì.
ex_zh: The teacher gave me a pencil to write with.

quote_en: 别哭了。 Bié kū le.
quote_zh: Don't cry.
ex_en: 上课的时候别说话。要认真听。 Shàngkè de shíhou bié shuōhuà. Yào rènzhēn tīng.
ex_zh: Don't talk during class. Listen carefully.

quote_en: 他不但会中文，而且会说英语。 Tā bùdàn huì Zhōngwén, érqiě huì shuō Yīngyǔ.
quote_zh: He not only knows Chinese, but also speaks English.
ex_en: 新西兰不但风景美，而且人很友善。 Xīnxīlán bùdàn fēngjǐng měi, érqiě rén hěn yǒushàn.
ex_zh: New Zealand not only has beautiful scenery, but also friendly people.

quote_en: 我不太喜欢吃辣。 Wǒ bù tài xǐhuan chī là.
quote_zh: I don't really like spicy food.
ex_en: 这个字的意思我不太清楚。要去查字典。 Zhège zì de yìsi wǒ bù tài qīngchu. Yào qù chá zìdiǎn.
ex_zh: I'm not very clear about the meaning of this character. I need to look it up.

quote_en: 我才看见你的短信。 Wǒ cái kànjiàn nǐ de duǎnxìn.
quote_zh: I just saw your text message.
ex_en: 昨天下午两点我才吃午饭。太忙了。 Zuótiān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn wǒ cái chī wǔfàn. Tài máng le.
ex_zh: I only ate lunch at 2 pm yesterday. Too busy.

quote_en: 他从北京来。 Tā cóng Běijīng lái.
quote_zh: He comes from Beijing.
ex_en: 很多游客从世界各地来新西兰旅游。 Hěnduō yóukè cóng shìjiè gèdì lái Xīnxīlán lǚyóu.
ex_zh: Many tourists come from all over the world to travel in New Zealand.

def_en: to go to, to arrive at
quote_en: 我到家了。 Wǒ dào jiā le.
quote_zh: I've arrived home.
ex_en: 校车八点到学校门口。要准时。 Xiàochē bā diǎn dào xuéxiào ménkǒu. Yào zhǔnshí.
ex_zh: The school bus arrives at the school gate at eight. Be on time.

quote_en: 我看到你在操场踢球。 Wǒ kàndào nǐ zài cāochǎng tīqiú.
quote_zh: I saw you playing soccer on the field.
ex_en: 从窗户可以看见大海。风景很美。 Cóng chuānghu kěyǐ kànjiàn dàhǎi. Fēngjǐng hěn měi.
ex_zh: From the window you can see the ocean. The view is beautiful.

quote_en: 这个对学习很有帮助。 Zhège duì xuéxí hěn yǒu bāngzhù.
quote_zh: This is very helpful for studying.
ex_en: 运动对身体很好。每天都要运动。 Yùndòng duì shēntǐ hěn hǎo. Měitiān dōu yào yùndòng.
ex_zh: Exercise is very good for the body. You should exercise every day.

quote_en: 十点了，该睡觉了。 Shí diǎn le, gāi shuìjiào le.
quote_zh: It's ten o'clock; time to sleep.
ex_en: 作业写完了，该休息一下了。 Zuòyè xiě wán le, gāi xiūxi yíxià le.
ex_zh: Homework is finished; time to rest a bit.

quote_en: 你跟我一起去吗？ Nǐ gēn wǒ yìqǐ qù ma?
quote_zh: Are you coming with me?
ex_en: 我跟他是好朋友。经常一起玩。 Wǒ gēn tā shì hǎo péngyou. Jīngcháng yìqǐ wán.
ex_zh: He and I are good friends. We often play together.

quote_en: 今天的天气比昨天更好。 Jīntiān de tiānqì bǐ zuótiān gèng hǎo.
quote_zh: Today's weather is even better than yesterday.
ex_en: 学习要更努力。才能进步。 Xuéxí yào gèng nǔlì. Cái néng jìnbù.
ex_zh: You need to study even harder. Then you can make progress.

def_zh: 还是回家吧；还是休息吧
quote_en: 下雨了，我们还是回家吧。 Xià yǔ le, wǒmen háishì huí jiā ba.
quote_zh: It's raining; let's go home instead.
ex_en: 这个太贵了，还是买那个便宜的吧。 Zhège tài guì le, háishì mǎi nàge piányi de ba.
ex_zh: This is too expensive; let's buy that cheaper one instead.

quote_en: 他好像不太高兴。 Tā hǎoxiàng bù tài gāoxìng.
quote_zh: He seems not very happy.
ex_en: 天气好像要下雨了。我们快回家吧。 Tiānqì hǎoxiàng yào xià yǔ le. Wǒmen kuài huí jiā ba.
ex_zh: It seems like it's going to rain. Let's go home quickly.

def_zh: 和朋友一起；和同学一起
quote_en: 我和朋友一起看电影。 Wǒ hé péngyou yìqǐ kàn diànyǐng.
quote_zh: I watched a movie with friends.
ex_en: 周末我和家人一起去海边玩。 Zhōumò wǒ hé jiārén yìqǐ qù hǎibiān wán.
ex_zh: On weekends I go to the seaside with my family.

quote_en: 我们可以去公园，或者去海边。 Wǒmen kěyǐ qù gōngyuán, huòzhě qù hǎibiān.
quote_zh: We can go to the park, or go to the seaside.
ex_en: 或者明天去，或者后天去。你决定吧。 Huòzhě míngtiān qù, huòzhě hòutiān qù. Nǐ juédìng ba.
ex_zh: Perhaps go tomorrow, or go the day after. You decide.

def_en: A is not as... as B
def_zh: 他没有我高；他没有弟弟高
quote_en: 他跑步没有我快。 Tā pǎobù méiyǒu wǒ kuài.
quote_zh: He is not as fast as me at running.
ex_en: 北京的冬天没有新西兰冷。 Běijīng de dōngtiān méiyǒu Xīnxīlán lěng.
ex_zh: Winter in Beijing is not as cold as in New Zealand.

quote_en: 那么，我们一起去吧。 Nàme, wǒmen yìqǐ qù ba.
quote_zh: Well then, let's go together.
ex_en: 下雨了，那么我们就不能去公园了。 Xià yǔ le, nàme wǒmen jiù bùnéng qù gōngyuán le.
ex_zh: It's raining; in that case we can't go to the park.

quote_en: 你能来我家玩吗？ Nǐ néng lái wǒ jiā wán ma?
quote_zh: Can you come to my house to play?
ex_en: 我生病了，不能去上学。 Wǒ shēngbìng le, bùnéng qù shàngxué.
ex_zh: I'm sick; I can't go to school.

quote_en: 我喜欢吃水果，苹果、香蕉什么的。 Wǒ xǐhuan chī shuǐguǒ, píngguǒ, xiāngjiāo shénme de.
quote_zh: I like eating fruit, like apples, bananas, and so on.
ex_en: 书包里有书、本子、笔什么的。 Shūbāo lǐ yǒu shū, běnzi, bǐ shénme de.
ex_zh: In my schoolbag there are books, notebooks, pens, and so on.

def_en: emphasis on details of an action
def_zh: 是坐巴士来的；是昨天到的
quote_en: 我是坐校车来的。 Wǒ shì zuò xiàochē lái de.
quote_zh: I came by school bus.
ex_en: 这个礼物是妈妈买的。 Zhège lǐwù shì māma mǎi de.
ex_zh: This gift was bought by Mum.

quote_en: 这本书挺有意思的。 Zhè běn shū tǐng yǒuyìsi de.
quote_zh: This book is quite interesting.
ex_en: 他中文说得挺不错的。 Tā Zhōngwén shuō de tǐng búcuò de.
ex_zh: He speaks Chinese quite well.

quote_en: 我吃完饭了。 Wǒ chī wán fàn le.
quote_zh: I've finished eating.
ex_en: 作业写完了吗？写完了就可以玩了。 Zuòyè xiě wán le ma? Xiě wán le jiù kěyǐ wán le.
ex_zh: Have you finished your homework? If you have, you can play.

quote_en: 为了学好中文，我每天练习。 Wèile xué hǎo Zhōngwén, wǒ měitiān liànxí.
quote_zh: In order to learn Chinese well, I practise every day.
ex_en: 为了身体健康，我每天运动。 Wèile shēntǐ jiànkāng, wǒ měitiān yùndòng.
ex_zh: For the sake of health, I exercise every day.

quote_en: 她长得像她妈妈。 Tā zhǎng de xiàng tā māma.
quote_zh: She looks like her mother.
ex_en: 像这样写，字会更漂亮。 Xiàng zhèyàng xiě, zì huì gèng piàoliang.
ex_zh: Write like this, the characters will be more beautiful.

def_zh: 一看就知道；一回家就学习
quote_en: 我一回家就写作业。 Wǒ yī huí jiā jiù xiě zuòyè.
quote_zh: As soon as I get home I do homework.
ex_en: 一听这首歌，我就想跳舞。 Yī tīng zhè shǒu gē, wǒ jiù xiǎng tiàowǔ.
ex_zh: Whenever I hear this song, I want to dance.

def_zh: 一边听一边写；一边吃一边看
quote_en: 他一边吃饭一边看电视。 Tā yìbiān chīfàn yìbiān kàn diànshì.
quote_zh: He eats while watching TV.
ex_en: 一边听音乐一边学习不太好。 Yìbiān tīng yīnyuè yìbiān xuéxí bù tài hǎo.
ex_zh: Studying while listening to music isn't very good.

quote_en: 请你快一点儿！ Qǐng nǐ kuài yìdiǎnr!
quote_zh: Please hurry up a bit!
ex_en: 这个汤太咸了，淡一点儿就好了。 Zhège tāng tài xián le, dàn yìdiǎnr jiù hǎo le.
ex_zh: This soup is too salty; a bit less salt would be good.

quote_en: 你看一下这个字对吗？ Nǐ kàn yíxià zhège zì duì ma?
quote_zh: Take a look, is this character correct?
ex_en: 请等一下，我马上来。 Qǐng děng yíxià, wǒ mǎshàng lái.
ex_zh: Please wait a moment, I'll be right there.

quote_en: 明天可能会下雨。 Míngtiān kěnéng huì xià yǔ.
quote_zh: It might rain tomorrow.
ex_en: 他有可能会来参加晚会。 Tā yǒu kěnéng huì lái cānjiā wǎnhuì.
ex_zh: It's possible he'll come to the party.

def_zh: 又高又大；又漂亮又聪明
quote_en: 这个苹果又大又红。 Zhège píngguǒ yòu dà yòu hóng.
quote_zh: This apple is both big and red.
ex_en: 她学习又好，又爱帮助同学。 Tā xuéxí yòu hǎo, yòu ài bāngzhù tóngxué.
ex_zh: She is both good at studying and likes to help classmates.

quote_en: 天气越来越热了。 Tiānqì yuèláiyuè rè le.
quote_zh: The weather is getting hotter and hotter.
ex_en: 我的中文越来越好。 Wǒ de Zhōngwén yuèláiyuè hǎo.
ex_zh: My Chinese is getting better and better.

quote_en: 我只会说一点中文。 Wǒ zhǐ huì shuō yìdiǎn Zhōngwén.
quote_zh: I can only speak a little Chinese.
ex_en: 他只吃菜，不吃肉。 Tā zhǐ chī cài, bù chī ròu.
ex_zh: He only eats vegetables, not meat.

quote_en: 我自己会做。 Wǒ zìjǐ huì zuò.
quote_zh: I can do it myself.
ex_en: 你要相信自己。 Nǐ yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ.
ex_zh: You must believe in yourself.

quote_en: 他有没有你高？ Tā yǒu méiyǒu nǐ gāo?
quote_zh: Is he as tall as you?
ex_en: 这个城市有没有北京大？ Zhège chéngshì yǒu méiyǒu Běijīng dà?
ex_zh: Is this city as big as Beijing?

quote_en: 让我看看你的照片。 Ràng wǒ kànkan nǐ de zhàopiàn.
quote_zh: Let me take a look at your photo.
ex_en: 请听一听这首歌，很好听。 Qǐng tīng yī tīng zhè shǒu gē, hěn hǎotīng.
ex_zh: Please listen to this song; it's very pleasant.

quote_en: 他的个子高高的。 Tā de gèzi gāogāo de.
quote_zh: He is very tall.
ex_en: 一个大大的蛋糕，真漂亮。 Yí ge dàdà de dàngāo, zhēn piàoliang.
ex_zh: A big cake, so beautiful.

pron: kàn dǒng / xué huì / chī wán
def_zh: 看懂了吗；学不会；吃不完
quote_en: 这个字你看懂了吗？ Zhège zì nǐ kàn dǒng le ma?
quote_zh: Do you understand this character?
ex_en: 这么多饭我吃不完。 Zhème duō fàn wǒ chī bù wán.
ex_zh: I can't finish so much rice.

pron: dài lái / dài qù / guò lái / guò qù
quote_en: 请把你的作业带过来。 Qǐng bǎ nǐ de zuòyè dài guòlai.
