quote_zh: Please bring your homework over.
ex_en: 他跑过去拿东西。 Tā pǎo guòqù ná dōngxi.
ex_zh: He ran over to get something.

quote_en: 请登录你的账号。 Qǐng dēnglù nǐ de zhànghào.
quote_zh: Please log in to your account.
ex_en: 要登录才能看视频。 Wǒ忘了密码。 Yào dēnglù cái néng kàn shìpín. Wǒ wàng le mìmǎ.
ex_zh: You need to log in to watch the video. I forgot the password.

quote_en: 你的密码是多少？ Nǐ de mìmǎ shì duōshǎo?
quote_zh: What is your password?
ex_en: 密码要记住，不要告诉别人。 Mìmǎ yào jìzhù, bùyào gàosu biérén.
ex_zh: Remember your password; don't tell others.

quote_en: 我收到了老师的邮件。 Wǒ shōudào le lǎoshī de yóujiàn.
quote_zh: I received an email from the teacher.
ex_en: 你发邮件给我了吗？我没收到。 Nǐ fā yóujiàn gěi wǒ le ma? Wǒ méi shōudào.
ex_zh: Did you send me an email? I didn't receive it.

quote_en: 我经常在线学中文。 Wǒ jīngcháng zàixiàn xué Zhōngwén.
quote_zh: I often learn Chinese online.
ex_en: 现在很多商店都可以在线买东西。 Xiànzài hěnduō shāngdiàn dōu kěyǐ zàixiàn mǎi dōngxi.
ex_zh: Nowadays many shops let you buy things online.

quote_en: 我会用电脑打字。 Wǒ huì yòng diànnǎo dǎzì.
quote_zh: I can type on a computer.
ex_en: 打字要慢慢练，以后就快了。 Dǎzì yào màn man liàn, yǐhòu jiù kuài le.
ex_zh: Typing requires slow practice; later it becomes fast.

quote_en: 我给你发一条语音吧。 Wǒ gěi nǐ fā yì tiáo yǔyīn ba.
quote_zh: I'll send you a voice message.
ex_en: 微信可以发语音，很方便。 Wēixìn kěyǐ fā yǔyīn, hěn fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: WeChat can send voice messages; it's very convenient.

quote_en: 我每天看中文视频学汉语。 Wǒ měitiān kàn shìpín xué Hànyǔ.
quote_zh: I watch Chinese videos every day to learn.
ex_en: 我们打视频电话吧，我想看看你。 Wǒmen dǎ shìpín diànhuà ba, wǒ xiǎng kànkan nǐ.
ex_zh: Let's make a video call; I want to see you.

quote_en: 我们一起自拍一张吧。 Wǒmen yìqǐ zìpāi yì zhāng ba.
quote_zh: Let's take a selfie together.
ex_en: 很多人喜欢自拍，然后发到网上。 Hěnduō rén xǐhuan zìpāi, ránhòu fā dào wǎngshàng.
ex_zh: Many people like taking selfies and then posting them online.

quote_en: 我们要保护自己的隐私。 Wǒmen yào bǎohù zìjǐ de yǐnsī.
quote_zh: We should protect our privacy.
ex_en: 不要在网上告诉别人你的隐私。 Bùyào zài wǎngshàng gàosu biérén nǐ de yǐnsī.
ex_zh: Don't tell others your private information online.

quote_en: 我用平板看电子书。 Wǒ yòng píngbǎn kàn diànzǐ shū.
quote_zh: I use a tablet to read e‑books.
ex_en: 弟弟有一个小平板，专门玩游戏。 Dìdi yǒu yí ge xiǎo píngbǎn, zhuānmén wán yóuxì.
ex_zh: My younger brother has a small tablet just for playing games.

quote_en: 上飞机前要关机。 Shàng fēijī qián yào guānjī.
quote_zh: You need to turn off devices before boarding the plane.
ex_en: 我的手机没电了，自动关机了。 Wǒ de shǒujī méi diàn le, zìdòng guānjī le.
ex_zh: My phone ran out of battery and turned off automatically.

quote_en: 手机没电了，要充电。 Shǒujī méi diàn le, yào chōngdiàn.
quote_zh: The phone has no power; it needs to be charged.
ex_en: 出门记得带充电器。 Chūmén jìde dài chōngdiànqì.
ex_zh: Remember to bring a charger when you go out.

def_zh: 手机充电器；充电器坏了
quote_en: 我的充电器坏了。 Wǒ de chōngdiànqì huài le.
quote_zh: My charger is broken.
ex_en: 买手机的时候会送充电器。 Mǎi shǒujī de shíhou huì sòng chōngdiànqì.
ex_zh: When you buy a phone, they give you a charger.

quote_en: 我收到了快递。 Wǒ shōudào le kuàidì.
quote_zh: I received a delivery.
ex_en: 在网上买东西，快递会送到家。 Zài wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi, kuàidì huì sòng dào jiā.
ex_zh: When you buy things online, delivery brings them to your home.

quote_en: 今天不想做饭，叫外卖吧。 Jīntiān bù xiǎng zuò fàn, jiào wàimài ba.
quote_zh: I don't feel like cooking today; let's order takeout.
ex_en: 外卖很快就到了。真方便。 Wàimài hěn kuài jiù dào le. Zhēn fāngbiàn.
ex_zh: The delivery arrived very quickly. So convenient.

quote_en: 从北京到上海可以坐高铁。 Cóng Běijīng dào Shànghǎi kěyǐ zuò gāotiě.
quote_zh: You can take high‑speed rail from Beijing to Shanghai.
ex_en: 高铁很快，也很舒服。 Gāotiě hěn kuài, yě hěn shūfu.
ex_zh: High‑speed rail is fast and also comfortable.

quote_en: 早餐很重要。 Zǎocān hěn zhòngyào.
quote_zh: Breakfast is very important.
ex_en: 我晚餐喜欢吃面条。 Wǒ wǎncān xǐhuan chī miàntiáo.
ex_zh: I like to eat noodles for dinner.

quote_en: 学校有一个大运动场。 Xuéxiào yǒu yí ge dà yùndòngchǎng.
quote_zh: The school has a big sports field.
ex_en: 飞机场离市中心很远。 Fēijīchǎng lí shì zhōngxīn hěn yuǎn.
ex_zh: The airport is far from the city centre.

quote_en: 我加入了学校的足球队。 Wǒ jiārù le xuéxiào de zúqiúduì.
quote_zh: I joined the school's soccer team.
ex_en: 全黑队是新西兰的橄榄球队。 Quánhēiduì shì Xīnxīlán de gǎnlǎnqiú duì.
ex_zh: The All Blacks is New Zealand's rugby team.

quote_en: 不要花太多时间玩手机。 Bùyào huā tài duō shíjiān wán shǒujī.
quote_zh: Don't spend too much time on your phone.
ex_en: 他花了很多钱买礼物。 Tā huā le hěnduō qián mǎi lǐwù.
ex_zh: He spent a lot of money buying gifts.

quote_en: 他的梦想是当科学家。 Tā de mèngxiǎng shì dāng kēxuéjiā.
quote_zh: His dream is to become a scientist.
ex_en: 我妈妈是画家，她画得很漂亮。 Wǒ māma shì huàjiā, tā huà de hěn piàoliang.
ex_zh: My mum is a painter; she paints beautifully.

quote_en: 我昨天晚上头疼。 Wǒ zuótiān wǎnshang tóuténg.
quote_zh: I had a headache last night.
ex_en: 牙疼要去看牙医。 Yáténg yào qù kàn yáyī.
ex_zh: If you have a toothache, you need to see a dentist.
